programme.title: Forensic Files: Shadow of a Doubt
programme.desc: An unknown assailant walked into a retail store and fired three shots, killing the owner. Police had suspects, but all of them had alibis.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Once Bitten
programme.desc: Ray Krone was known throughout Arizona as the snaggletooth killer. An unusual bite-mark on a murdered woman resulted in his conviction and death sentence.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Speck of Evidence
programme.desc: On September 17, 1984, in a suburb of Tucson, Arizona, eight-year-old Vicki Hoskins left home on her pink bicycle to mail a letter for her mother. She never returned.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Broken Bond
programme.desc: The story of nurse Tanya Reid who may have murdered her own baby and was planning to murder her son.

programme.title: Impeachment Hearings
programme.desc: Watch coverage of the House Intelligence Committee impeachment hearings on President Donald Trump.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Nailed
programme.desc: Just before she's scheduled to testify against her alleged rapist, a woman is murdered on her front lawn. 15 years later, investigators used new technology to finally catch the woman's killer.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Sign of the Zodiac
programme.desc: A serial killer that admires the infamous Zodiac Killer prowls New York City's streets for six years, trying to kill one person for every zodiac sign. Police use a variety of forensic tools to arrest the culprit.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Tourist Trap
programme.desc: Bite marks lead the police to a killer.

programme.title: Forensic Files: All Wet
programme.desc: When one woman's drowning death in Pennsylvania triggers another investigation into a woman's eerily similar death in North Carolina, medical examiners must determine if the women drowned or were in fact murdered.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Chief Evidence
programme.desc: A couple was murdered during what looked like a drug deal gone awry. But police found no drugs in the home of the victims and there were no traces of the victims' blood on the clothing of the suspects. The victim's dog eventually led police to the killer.

programme.title: Forensic Files: The Metal Business
programme.desc: Phillip Rouss' health declined, and doctors couldn't pinpoint the source of his illness.

programme.title: Forensic Files: A Welcome Intrusion
programme.desc: Years after a man is hailed for shooting the man who allegedly criminally harassed him and murdered his wife after breaking into their home, new technologies force the police to reassess the case. A tragic tale soon becomes even more tragic in a new way.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Order Up
programme.desc: The murder of a prominent businessman in Colorado is particularly difficult to solve since the killers left virtually no forensic evidence at the scene.

programme.title: Gold Rush: White Water: Landslide
programme.desc: There's still no sign of bedrock gold, but as the crew starts to question Dustin's leadership, his determination pays off.

programme.title: Gold Rush: White Water: Two Teams, One Dream
programme.desc: Fred and Dustin Hurt decide to split up in their hunt for gold in the raging waters of Alaska's Chilkat mountains. While Fred has an ideal spot picked out, Dustin has a big decision to make about his location.

programme.title: Gold Rush: The Nugget Hunter
programme.desc: Rick and his dad fly high into Keno mountains on a treasure hunt. Parker makes a decision about his crew that could determine the fate of his season. Tony checks a spot the old dredges missed and assesses which of his kids might take over one day.

programme.title: Gold Rush: Leave No Gold Behind
programme.desc: Parker questions the ground he's mining and his new foremen. Tony makes a big decision to move the family's entire operation. Rick's mechanic arrives at a critical moment. Then, the Dakota Boys work together in the hunt for gold in Alaska's raging waters.

programme.title: Gold Rush: Pay Dirt: We're Gonna Need A Bigger Bucket
programme.desc: With added facts and bonus scenes: Parker's team faces a huge engineering challenge. Meanwhile, Rick dives into a substantial operational upgrade. And two of the Beets siblings, Mike and Monica, look to open more ground as a team.

programme.title: Gold Rush: Monster Red Lives
programme.desc: In search of big nuggets, Rick buys a monster washplant. A flood puts Tony's new claim in jeopardy. Parker needs to move Big Red in record time. Dustin's crew finds a claim, but must make it through the waterfall's pound zone. Fred introduces a new miner.

programme.title: Outback Opal Hunters: Opal Fever
programme.desc: Rookie opal hunters Daniel Becker and Justin Lang leave their families behind, risking it all to chase an opal fortune. Lucky enough to stake a claim on a legendary site known as Shell Patch Reserve, they test their luck.

programme.title: Gold Rush: Monster Red Lives

programme.title: Gold Rush: The Dakota Boys

programme.title: Bering Sea Gold: Race the Storm
programme.desc: With Nome in the crosshairs of a winter storm that will shut down the harbor, Shawn and Ken battle to win their bet, but only one will be crowned The Gold King.

programme.title: Bering Sea Gold: Pay the Piper

programme.title: Major League Fishing's Pro Bass Tour: Bass Pro Tour: 2019 Stage Seven Table Rock
programme.desc: The championship round of Major League Fishing's Bass Pro Tour, stage seven Table Rock.

programme.title: Secret Nazi Ruins: The Devil's Lair
programme.desc: When a top-secret Nazi base is discovered in France decades after the war ends, experts use cutting-edge tech to reveal the secrets of this deadly compound; what they find could change everything we know about D-Day and the last stand of the Nazi regime.

programme.title: Secret Nazi Ruins: Mystery of the Nazi Nukes
programme.desc: When a secret bunker and a vast network of tunnels are discovered after World War II, experts use cutting-edge tech to uncover if the high levels of radiation in the area could be connected to a classified Nazi nuclear program.

programme.title: Secret Nazi Ruins: Conspiracy on Death Island
programme.desc: A strange, abandoned mansion on a remote island is central to countless conspiracy theories, and new discoveries reveal if this eerie site was a secret Nazi base intended for a sinister mission.

programme.title: Secret Nazi Ruins: The Doomsday Castle
programme.desc: An abandoned eerie structure in France could have doomed the Allies in World War II, and new discoveries at this mysterious site reveal the truth behind top-secret Nazi plans to unleash apocalyptic destruction.

programme.title: Secret Nazi Ruins: Hitler's Invisible City
programme.desc: As the Soviet Army pushes the Nazis out of Poland, they discover a massive city of over a thousand buildings that was unknown to the Allies, and using the latest science, experts reveal how Hitler was able to keep this sinister place hidden for so long.

programme.title: Moonshiners: Art of the 'Shine: Double Pot Still
programme.desc: Featuring the 'Art of Shine' with Mark, Digger and Tim; moonshiner Tim makes a risky move and adds a second pot to the still site to double his profits.

programme.title: Moonshiners: Art of the 'Shine: Underground Still
programme.desc: Presenting the 'Art of Shine' with Mark, Digger and Tim. Mark and Jeff call in legendary moonshiner Jim Tom to help fix their busted still. Then, it's man vs beast when Mark hunts down a giant wild hog that's been stalking their site.

programme.title: Four Weddings: ...and a Fast Food Diet
programme.desc: Tulisa's garden nuptials leave her guests feeling peaceful, while Crystal's rockabilly beach party has guests dancing.

programme.title: Laff Mobb's Laff Tracks: Janelle James Headlines
programme.desc: The always funny Janelle James headlines tonight. Plus, Blaq Ron gives a brief history lesson on line dancing, Kerry Coddett contemplates alternate styles of dating and Reggie Conquest has a PSA for kids.

programme.title: Laff Mobb's Laff Tracks: Two-Week Girl
programme.desc: Funny woman Tyree Elaine wants you to know she is tired of your relationship statuses, Nate Jackson has a hilarious message for the church, and Alycia Cooper takes a non-smoker's break so she can think outside the cubicle.

programme.title: Laff Mobb's Laff Tracks: Ride or Die
programme.desc: Chaunte Wayans learns that a gas station is a foodie's paradise, Fatimah Taliah has a wild night out, and Reyna Amaya can't stand girls who won't pee in the street. Plus, Mark Viera gives us a one-two punch in the joke of the night.

programme.title: Laff Mobb's Laff Tracks: Cat Calling

programme.title: New Girl: Injured
programme.desc: When Nick gets hurt playing a game of touch football, Jess learns that he doesn't have insurance and brings him to her doctor friend.

programme.title: New Girl: Jess and Julia
programme.desc: Nick panics when Julia doesn't want to put a label on their relationship. Meanwhile, Jess asks Julia to help her get out of a traffic ticket, and Winston reconnects with a former booty call.

programme.title: New Girl: The Landlord
programme.desc: Against Nick's wishes, Jess makes it her mission to get the loft's cantankerous landlord to like her, but she inadvertently jeopardizes their living situation.

programme.title: New Girl: Kids
programme.desc: Jess babysits Russell's pre-teen daughter for the weekend and meets his ex-wife.

programme.title: Adam Ruins Everything: Adam Ruins the Wild West
programme.desc: Adam illustrates how, despite its macho man reputation, prostitutes actually helped settle the West. He then goes on to explain why the 'All-American Cowboy' is a myth, and that the real hero of the west wasn't a person at all - it was air conditioning.

programme.title: Adam Ruins Everything: Adam Ruins Justice
programme.desc: After getting Emily out of prison, Adam and his sister Rhea take on the justice system, shining a spotlight on the infamous McDonalds hot coffee lawsuit, and the substantial problems with the jury duty system.

programme.title: Adam Ruins Everything: Adam Ruins the Hospital
programme.desc: Inflated hospital costs have created an unfair system, reckless antibiotic prescriptions makes them worthless, and you might not need a mammogram.

programme.title: Adam Ruins Everything: Adam Ruins What We Learned in School
programme.desc: Adam shows that Columbus didn't discover America, King Tut was a dud, and the rules of grammar are not as ironclad as you'd think.

programme.title: Adam Ruins Everything: Emily Ruins Adam
programme.desc: Emily takes over to ruin Adam, debunking IQ tests and pointing out information Adam has gotten wrong in the past. Plus, she explains the backfire effect.

programme.title: Adam Ruins Everything: Adam Ruins the Economy
programme.desc: Adam explains why doing taxes is unnecessarily complicated, the economic numbers we hear don't reveal much, and American manufacturing can't return.

programme.title: Adam Ruins Everything: Adam Ruins Conspiracy Theories
programme.desc: Adam debunks the fake moon landing theory, discusses the Satanic Panic of the 1980s and reveals how to spot a false theory.

programme.title: Adam Ruins Everything: Adam Ruins Spa Day
programme.desc: Pricey detox treatments may do more harm than good, MSG's scary reputation is undeserved and the placebo effect is way more powerful than one may think.

programme.title: World's Dumbest...: World's Dumbest Thrillseekers 7

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Unlikely Partners
programme.desc: Guy checks out some unique combos in Los Angeles and in Toronto.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: That's Fresh
programme.desc: This trip, Guy's stopping by some joints that are keeping it fresh. In San Francisco, the Venezuelan joint serving up a totally gluten-free menu of authentic standbys like arepas and empanadas.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Slammin' Sammies
programme.desc: Guy hits up hot eateries around the nation; visiting in Virginia Beach and San Antonio.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Streamlined Sammies
programme.desc: In Texas, a trailer serves scratch-made sammies to customers on the street and in the bar. In Minneapolis, a food truck offers lobster rolls. And in Dallas, burgers are served.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Funky Finds
programme.desc: Guy discovers some hidden gems like a fish shack that flies in the fish, and a volunteer-run brunch spot where kids do the cooking.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Belly Up
programme.desc: A Chicago brewhouse serves up beer to go with mussels, a brisket sandwich and headcheese.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Coast to Coast Chow
programme.desc: Guy's quest is covering the country. In Charleston, S.C., a breakfast hangout does a chicken-fried biscuit and a shrimp BLT. In Chicago, a 40-year-old institution is busting out traditional German specialties.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Talkin Turkey
programme.desc: Guy Fieri enjoys a turkey dinner at a Boston joint where it's Thanksgiving every day.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: A Triple D Thanksgiving
programme.desc: Guy's chasing down the holiday meal every which way. In Portland, Maine, a family-run joint where stuffed turkey and stuffed lobster are Thanksgiving traditions.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: All Kinds of Gobble Gobble
programme.desc: This trip, Guy's getting a variety of Thanksgiving tastes and treasures. From traditional turkey wild rice soup and pumpkin pie in Santa Fe, N.M., to a totally unique take on the Thanksgiving bird.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Triple D Nation: Trottin' Out the Turkey
programme.desc: Guy Fieri is checkin' out Flavortown's all-time turkey-centric spots. At a Boston diner, Guy reminisces about the Thanksgiving plate he had in 2007. Then, in New Orleans, traditional turkey gets the French Quarter flair.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Turkey-Giving
programme.desc: Guy's dishin' out the spirit of Thanksgiving! In Princeton, N.J., Rev Run jumps in at a crepe place serving their take on a turkey club and a 20-layer cake.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Pizza Plus
programme.desc: On this trip, Guy Fieri is divin' into the pie and other major mouthfuls. In Boston, a joint putting beer into their crust and then topping it with taco fixins and a steak-and-cola combo.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Culinary Journey
programme.desc: Guy Fieri's hitting the road for on an off-the-chain culinary journey. On the Big Island, a Filipino-Hawaiian mashup making a name for leaving diners speechless.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Beef, Lamb And Pig

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Kickin' It in Cancun
programme.desc: This trip, Guy Fieri's headin' south of the border to dig into Cancun cuisine, like an authentic, family-owned spot where grandma's cookin' up real-deal rellenos and killer chicharron gorditas.

programme.title: Barefoot Contessa: Cook Like A Pro: Celebration Sides
programme.desc: Ina Garten is shaking up the classics and sharing a fresh look at side dishes for a stunning holiday meal. Her centerpiece is a foolproof English rib roast, and she reveals her tricks for getting it right every time.

programme.title: Giada's Holiday Handbook: Thanksgiving Feast
programme.desc: It's the big Thanksgiving dinner, and this year it's all about keeping it simple. Giada asks her guests to each bring something that can be added to a large antipasti platter as an afternoon appetizer.

programme.title: Trisha's Southern Kitchen: Turkey Day, The Easy Way!
programme.desc: To keep this holiday as stress-free as possible, Trisha makes an array of make-ahead dishes that are perfect to hold and heat up on Thanksgiving Day.

programme.title: 30 Minute Meals: Vive La Din Din
programme.desc: Rachael Ray proves that rich and creamy chicken can be prepared in less than 30 minutes - and with only a handful of ingredients. She makes a Dijon-tarragon chicken, mashed potatoes with brie or camembert and rainbow chard with bacon and leeks.

programme.title: The Pioneer Woman: Thanksgiving Potluck: Kitchen Confessional
programme.desc: Ree spills the beans on her Thanksgiving potluck favourites. There's a show stopping pumpkin rum cake with maple whipped cream and, for the main dish, amazing glazed ham. The best broccoli rice casserole and slow cooker sweet potatoes round it out.

programme.title: The Pioneer Woman: Ask Me Anything: Thanksgiving
programme.desc: Ree Drummond is tackling a fun, Thanksgiving-themed Q and A, where the answers include an awesome Thanksgiving breakfast casserole and pumpkin tiramisu, her favorite holiday dessert. She also serves up Nan's Cranberry Sauce.

programme.title: The Kitchen: Thankfull Thanksgiving

programme.title: Trisha's Southern Kitchen: Giving Thanks and Giving Back

programme.title: Ancient Aliens: Alien Resurrections
programme.desc: Throughout history, incredible stories have been told of the dead rising from their graves. From Jesus and Elijah to mummies and zombies, our culture is filled with accounts of beings who are able to lift the veil between life and death.

programme.title: Ancient Aliens: Secrets of the Mummies
programme.desc: Ancient Astronaut theorists believe the global practice of mummification is not a coincidence, but proof that highly advanced extraterrestrials visited Earth in the distant past.

programme.title: Ancient Aliens: The Monoliths
programme.desc: Ancient people achieved extraordinary feats of construction without advanced tools or technology. Look at the possibility that extraterrestrials instructed the ancients, or they may have been driven to create them in order to reconnect.

programme.title: Ancient Aliens: Aliens and the Third Reich
programme.desc: During World War II, there were reports that the Germans built an operational flying saucer, known as the Hanebu, which was said to use mythical technology found in ancient Indian texts. Take a look at whether Hitler was aided by aliens.

programme.title: Ancient Aliens: Secret Files: Human Hieroglyphs
programme.desc: Tattoos, piercings and body modification account for a nearly one-billion-dollar industry.

programme.title: Ancient Aliens: The Storming of Area 51
programme.desc: In 2019, millions responded to an internet post advocating to storm the gates of the world's most top-secret military installation: Area 51. When they did, the US military vowed to defend the base with deadly force.

programme.title: In Search Of: Nazi Secrets
programme.desc: Nazi Germany amassed a collection of stolen wealth and technology and not all of it has been recovered. The loot include a stockpile of gold, a powerful weapon and a treasure called the missing eighth wonder of the world.

programme.title: Ancient Aliens: The Secrets of Stonehenge
programme.desc: A shocking DNA study released in 2018 reveals that the original builders of Stonehenge mysteriously vanished. Experts discuss if Stonehenge's mysterious 'bluestone circle' could have activated a portal that transported the culture back to the stars.

programme.title: The Simpsons: Grampy Can Ya Hear Me

programme.title: Movie: Anchorman 2: The Legend Continues

programme.title: Movie: The Last Samurai
programme.desc: In 19th century Japan, an American military advisor embraces the samurai culture he was hired to destroy after he is captured in battle.

programme.title: Movie: A Few Good Men
programme.desc: A cover-up is revealed after two young marines are accused of murdering a member of their platoon on a U.S. Naval base.

programme.title: The Graham Norton Show
programme.desc: Graham gets to sit and chat with Dame Julie Andrews, Reese Witherspoon, Jennifer Aniston, Sir Ian McKellen and Dua Lipa.

programme.title: Movie: A Few Good Men
programme.desc: A cover-up is revealed after two young marines are accused of murdering a member of their platoon on a U.S. Naval base.

programme.title: Movie: The Outsiders
programme.desc: In 1960s Oklahoma, a tragic chain of events unfolds when tensions builds between two rival gangs, the Greasers and the Socials, after a Greaser kills a Social.

programme.title: Attenborough and the Giant Elephant
programme.desc: The amazing life story of the most famous elephant to have ever lived: Jumbo. With scientists from around the world, Sir David has unique access to the elephant's skeleton at the American Museum of Natural History.

programme.title: Great Bear Stakeout
programme.desc: Experts spend an entire season in Alaska to see what it takes for a grizzly to survive.

programme.title: Great Bear Stakeout
programme.desc: Alaska's famous salmon run arrives, and Parsnip and Puski return to feed, but face fierce competition.

programme.title: Wild Singapore: Hidden World
programme.desc: In this first episode, we explore Singapore's hidden wilderness, overlooked areas of the island that are home to an astonishing variety of fascinating creatures.

programme.title: Wild Singapore: Urban Wild
programme.desc: Moving beyond the wild parts of Singapore, Sir David Attenborough takes us through a day in the life of the wildlife residing in Singapore's urban environments, from civets taking up residence in roof cavities to pythons hunting in drains.

programme.title: Wild Singapore: Islands
programme.desc: Head beneath the waves of Singapore's coast and islands to discover some of its aquatic animals, including the rare tiger tail seahorse, the powerful pistol shrimp and the dog-faced water snake.

programme.title: Wild Singapore: Forest Life
programme.desc: An exploration of Singapore's forests, which are home to some of the least known primates in the world, flying dragons, mating snakes, and many more.

programme.title: Wild West: Desert Heartlands
programme.desc: Travel from the cold deserts of Nevada to the giant cactus-studded lands of Arizona and the scorching Mojave Desert in California. Discover how some of America's most iconic animals like mustangs and coyotes have learned to survive.

programme.title: Wild West: The High Country
programme.desc: America's High Country is the last of grizzly bears and giant trees, of frigid winters and scorching summers, of tough ranchers and gold-rush fever. From the Rockies to the Sierra Nevada, survival in this land of extreme seasons demands endurance.

programme.title: Wild West: Restless Shores
programme.desc: Tectonic forces shape all life here, creating stunning landscapes like the San Andreas Fault, reaching north to the Pacific coast. Elephant seals battle it out for mates and grey whales form a unique friendship with a small community of people.

programme.title: Wild Alaska: Spring
programme.desc: As spring lights up the land, Alaska faces the greatest transformation on earth. Temperatures soar, and as the sun hits the snow and ice, water, light and warmth return.

programme.title: Hard Time: Locked Up: Inmates vs. Officers
programme.desc: From feeding the inmates to combating riots, keeping the peace in this small city on lockdown comes down to the officers, but giving in to the control of the system is up to the inmates.

programme.title: Hard Time: Locked Up: Battle Behind Bars
programme.desc: Every day is a battle for control among some of the state's toughest inmates at Georgia's Smith State Prison. Tensions build when a cell floods and angry prisoners must evacuate. A huge fight erupts when an officer is attacked by a group of inmates.

programme.title: Hard Time: Locked Up: The Convict Cycle
programme.desc: Home to 1,500 of the state's roughest convicts, Hays State Prison in the hills of northwest Georgia is a disciplinary camp with closed security. Meet inmates who swear that prison has changed them: some for the better, perhaps, and some for the worse.

programme.title: Hard Time: Locked Up: Female Offenders
programme.desc: Managing female offenders is one of the toughest jobs in corrections, and at the Ohio Reformatory for Women the system is tested daily by every kind of inmate.

programme.title: Hard Time: Locked Up: Losing Las Vegas
programme.desc: When inmates do time on the inside, family does time on the outside.

programme.title: Lockdown: On the Inside: War Within
programme.desc: Officers race to stop escalating gang violence before it erupts into a full-scale war at California’s Salinas Valley State Prison.

programme.title: Hard Time: Locked Up: Vegas Breakdown

programme.title: Hard Time: Locked Up: Losing Las Vegas

programme.title: Life and Death Row: Final Sentence
programme.desc: Hoping DNA testing proves his innocence, Stacey Johnson and his family look to have his execution stayed. The clemency hearings for Ledell Lee are also presented, an inmate who is scheduled to be executed the same night as Johnson.

programme.title: Life and Death Row: The Oath
programme.desc: Lynn Scott, the sister of death row inmate Jack Jones, worries that the number of medications he's on could mean that the lethal injection drugs won’t work properly, resulting in an agonizing death.

programme.title: Life and Death Row: Mercy
programme.desc: We follow Lynn Scott, the sister of inmate Jack Jones, and Lacey Phillips, the daughter of Jones' victim, as they attend day three of the executions.

programme.title: Life and Death Row: Last Gasp
programme.desc: We meet death row inmate Kenneth Williams, who was sentenced to death for the murder of a 57-year-old farmer named Cecil Boren.

programme.title: Life and Death Row: In Cold Blood
programme.desc: With only seven days before the possibility of execution, former U.S. Marine John Ramirez fights to survive.

programme.title: America's National Parks: Yosemite National Park
programme.desc: In the Sierra Nevada Mountains is a remarkable valley: Yosemite National Park. It was carved by glaciers, nurtured by Native Americans and protected by Presidential decree. This is the story of Yosemite and one man's mission to protect its giant trees.

programme.title: America's National Parks: Gates of the Arctic
programme.desc: The Gates of the Arctic National Park in the north of Alaska is one of the last untamed places on our planet.

programme.title: Mythical Beasts: Dark Secrets of the Sphinx
programme.desc: New discoveries uncover the dark secrets of Egypt's strange half-man, half-lion beast, revealing why the pharaohs were so intent on transforming into this powerful and ferocious monster.

programme.title: Mythical Beasts: The Kraken Awakens
programme.desc: New discoveries suggest that a sea beast like the Kraken could have existed, and experts examine a strange monster that could give shocking answers into this underwater mystery.

programme.title: Mythical Beasts: Revenge of the Cyclops
programme.desc: New discoveries reveal that the cyclops, a one-eyed cannibal, could have been more than just a story.

programme.title: Mythical Beasts: The Dragon's Inferno
programme.desc: New discoveries reveal hard evidence showing that dragons were not just the stuff of nightmares, and experts use the latest science to explain why people believed in these wicked creatures.

programme.title: Mission Declassified: Escape From Alcatraz
programme.desc: Three prisoners escaped from Alcatraz in 1962. Officially, they died in the surrounding waters, but FBI files say otherwise. Christof Putzel braves those same waters to hunt down inside information before going on a manhunt to Brazil.

programme.title: Mission Declassified: Decoding America's UFO Secrets
programme.desc: Christof heads to the woods of the UK and snowy fields of Canada to determine what the truth is behind UFO sightings. He soon uncovers a much bigger story behind what secrets the government is hiding.

programme.title: Mission Declassified: The Hunt For D.B. Cooper
programme.desc: Christof jumps from a plane and digs up rare FBI files as he follows shocking new leads that take him from the Pacific Northwest to Las Vegas and Utah in his quest to find the real identity of hijacker D.B. Cooper.

programme.title: Mission Declassified: The Axeman of New Orleans
programme.desc: A century ago, New Orleans was terrorized by an axe murderer. Now Christof discovers new leads that could point to some of the earliest mafia hits. This gruesome crime spree takes him from the Big Easy to Sicily and Los Angeles.

programme.title: Mission Declassified: Escape From Alcatraz

programme.title: Underground Marvels: Secrets of the Terror Tunnels
programme.desc: A vast system of tunnels built almost three thousand years ago was the site of the greatest battles of antiquity, and these disorienting passages could be the deadliest weapon in war. Experts reveal what made this underground world so terrifying.

programme.title: Underground Marvels: Mystery of the Lost Labyrinth
programme.desc: A strange, centuries-old labyrinth built into an abandoned quarry was built by an eccentric millionaire, and no one knows why; but now, a new excavation into this mysterious 9,000-foot tunnel system might finally reveal its dark secrets.

programme.title: Underground Marvels: Secrets of the Rock
programme.desc: A hidden, subterranean city built within the Rock of Gibraltar was an immense fortress to control the seas during World War II, and new discoveries reveal the secrets of a long-lost chamber with evidence of high-stakes espionage.

programme.title: Underground Marvels: The Renegade's Lair
programme.desc: A strange underground system known as the Black Cave is connected to a fairytale castle and was home to an infamous nobleman on the run from the law; today, experts investigate the secrets he left here to discover new parts of this mysterious network.

programme.title: Underground Marvels: Cave of the Body Snatchers
programme.desc: An eerie system of underground vaults in Scotland was once the hideout for thieves who stole newly-buried bodies and sold them; today, experts are excavating these rubble-filled caves to reveal the secrets of what these bandits left behind.

programme.title: Mysteries of the Abandoned: Alaska's Fort Apocalypse
programme.desc: In Alaska, the ruins of a massive compound point to eerie evidence of an apocalyptic mystery. New discoveries reveal why this strange marvel was built in the snowy wilds of the Last Frontier and why it was abandoned.

programme.title: Mysteries of the Abandoned: Secret of Supervillain Island
programme.desc: On a strange island off the coast of Croatia, the mysterious ruins of a long-abandoned hideout look like they once belonged to a James Bond supervillain, and new discoveries reveal why it was built and why they were abandoned.

programme.title: Mysteries of the Abandoned: Secrets of the Doomsday Caves
programme.desc: A vast network of subterranean bunkers in the American west was home to the power to destroy nations, but today, this facility is deserted, and new discoveries reveal why this eerie place was built and why it was abandoned.

programme.title: Mysteries of the Abandoned: The Devil's Prison
programme.desc: A haunted prison with a terrifying past once housed America's most notorious criminals, but today, the fortress stands in ruin, and experts reveal evidence of ghostly secrets hidden in the crumbling jailhouse walls.

programme.title: Mysteries of the Abandoned: Jungle of the Damned
programme.desc: At an infamous prison in the Amazon, the most dangerous criminals on earth faced hard labour, a hostile environment and death by guillotine. Today, it's deserted, and new discoveries reveal why this hellish compound was built and why it was abandoned.

programme.title: Mysteries of the Abandoned: The Town That Disappeared
programme.desc: A haunted lighthouse on Lake Michigan, a town where everyone seems to have vanished all at once, and a secret complex of tunnels beneath London.

programme.title: Mysteries of the Abandoned: Haunting of Heartbreak Castle
programme.desc: Experts investigate what was once a fairy-tale castle, but now is abandoned, and rumored to be haunted. They uncover secrets of the ancient fortress, and its ghostly stories.

programme.title: The Squad: Prison Police: Extortion

programme.title: Your Worst Nightmare: Locked Away
programme.desc: After a college graduate goes missing from her parents' home, investigators must rely on quick thinking and cunning police work, as they race against the clock to find her before it's too late.

programme.title: Your Worst Nightmare: Play Dead
programme.desc: After 30-year-old single mom Kaye Robinson turns a suspicious late-night stranger away from her door, she has no idea the threat to her family is far from over. But with her young son in the home, she'll do everything in her power to keep him safe.

programme.title: Your Worst Nightmare: One Last Goodbye
programme.desc: After breaking free from her controlling ex-husband, single mom Tanya Petro doesn't have much time to date. Until she meets Ron Gibson and falls helplessly in love with him. But just a few months into the relationship, Tanya mysteriously disappears.

programme.title: Death for Dessert
programme.desc: 46-year-old Tami Engleman is a hard-working nurse's aide when she meets 59-year-old jeweler and local playboy Alan Duvall at a wedding. At first seeming like the perfect match for each other, the honeymoon doesn't last, and someone ends up dead.

programme.title: 48 Hours on ID: NCIS: To Catch a Killer
programme.desc: D'Wayne Swear, a former NCIS agent who inspired CBS' 'NCIS: New Orleans' takes viewers inside the real-life cross-country search for the killer of a young woman in San Diego.

programme.title: 48 Hours on ID: NCIS: The Double Cross
programme.desc: A videotape left behind by a dead wife may help investigators solve the murder of two navy sailors.

programme.title: Body Cam: Disorderly Conduct
programme.desc: A police officer tracks down an armed carjacker and comes under heavy fire. A stabbing in broad daylight forces the police to take decisive action. A routine traffic stop results in an officer being shot and fighting for his life.

programme.title: 48 Hours on ID: NCIS: To Catch a Killer
programme.desc: D'Wayne Swear, a former NCIS agent who inspired CBS' 'NCIS: New Orleans' takes viewers inside the real-life cross-country search for the killer of a young woman in San Diego.

programme.title: 48 Hours on ID: NCIS: The Double Cross
programme.desc: A videotape left behind by a dead wife may help investigators solve the murder of two navy sailors.

programme.title: Body Cam: Disorderly Conduct
programme.desc: A police officer tracks down an armed carjacker and comes under heavy fire. A stabbing in broad daylight forces the police to take decisive action. A routine traffic stop results in an officer being shot and fighting for his life.

programme.title: Death for Dessert
programme.desc: 46-year-old Tami Engleman is a hard-working nurse's aide when she meets 59-year-old jeweler and local playboy Alan Duvall at a wedding. At first seeming like the perfect match for each other, the honeymoon doesn't last, and someone ends up dead.

programme.title: Betrayed: Final Curtain
programme.desc: From devoted mother, to passionate lover to larger-than-life stage actress, forty-year-old Pasinetta Prince plays many roles in her life and she relishes the spotlight. Until a personal betrayal draws the final curtain and ends her life.

programme.title: Betrayed: Two's Company, Three is Murder
programme.desc: From the outside, 34-year-old Linda Singleton's life appears picture perfect. Little does everyone know Linda is engaged in a deadly love triangle. When the affair comes to light, her 'perfect' life comes to an untimely end.

programme.title: 48 Hours: The Mysterious Death of Casey Kasem
programme.desc: Four years after his death, a family feud erupts over radio legend Casey Kasem and exactly how he died and who was responsible. An estate that could be worth $100 million is at stake.

programme.title: 48 Hours: Hunted
programme.desc: Go inside the mind of a serial rapist hunting his victims while two detectives were hunting him.

programme.title: 48 Hours: Hollywood Horror Story
programme.desc: A mother’s intuition that something is wrong with her daughter leads Los Angeles police to a house of horrors. Inside, they found Iana Kasian, 30, brutally murdered. Where the trail of blood led them could be the subject of a movie script or horror novel.

programme.title: Evil Twins: The Family Curse
programme.desc: Identical twins Jordan and Simon Gann had potential in their youth. But as teens they take a dark turn. Soon small lies and thievery give way to a global crime spree where the twins exploit the vulnerabilities of others in a cruel and twisted game.

programme.title: Evil Twins: Mile High Monsters
programme.desc: When a young mother disappears outside Denver, an investigation leads police to the home of identical twins Daniel and David DeWild. The brothers claim to know nothing of the crime, but their pact of silence will end when one twin betrays the other.

programme.title: Evil Twins: Hell Hath No Fury
programme.desc: Identical twins Yvette and Doris Gay are a close-knit pair, but when they meet Renwick Gibbs, their quiet duo transforms into a dangerous threesome. And soon they with devise a murderous scheme that will change one innocent family's life forever.

programme.title: Evil Stepmothers: A Murder You Can't Ignore
programme.desc: Successful and newly single, Colleen Batten is having a hard time starting over when she bumps into old flame, Bob Harris. She plans to change her luck with this father of three. His kids soon find out just how evil Colleen can really be.

programme.title: Evil Stepmothers: She Can't Hide
programme.desc: Beautiful Elisa Redelsberger appears eager to start a new life when she meets softhearted lawyer and devoted father, Larry McNabney. But few suspect the depth of evil behind Elisa's façade until she pulls off the ultimate disappearing act.

programme.title: Evil Stepmothers: Nanny Nightmare
programme.desc: Donna is fit,beautiful, and maternal -exactly what Dennis Yaklich needs as a single dad to four kids. Soon his children see another side to their new stepmom.

programme.title: Evil Stepmothers: Deadly Role Play
programme.desc: Anita Smithey appears trapped in an abusive marriage, until Robert Cline comes along. After a fresh start with his family, Anita seems to feel safe. But she soon reveals a dark side to her new step kids. And the prey becomes the ultimate predator.

programme.title: Chasing Conspiracies: The Pearl Harbor Cover Up
programme.desc: History says that this was the ultimate sneak attack, but conspiracists are convinced that the U.S. President knew it was coming and decided to sacrifice their own troops to give the country an excuse to join the war against Germany.

programme.title: Codes and Conspiracies: Civil War
programme.desc: From a secret society that gathers in the dead of night and plots the assassination of Abraham Lincoln, to U.S. spymaster Alan Pinkerton who stops Confederate agents, the outcome of the Civil War is often decided by spies.

programme.title: Codes and Conspiracies: Secret Prisons
programme.desc: The dark history of America's Secret Prisons is revealed.

programme.title: I (Almost) Got Away With It: Got Caught by a Cougar
programme.desc: Robert Spencer has just shot his girlfriend. He is a thug and drug dealer, who in a blind panic gets high and goes on the run, living every day as a party. He finds the affection of a friend's mother, which ultimately leads to his arrest.

programme.title: I (Almost) Got Away With It: Got to Get Revenge
programme.desc: Scott Eizember has a temper and a history of abuse. So when his girlfriend dumps him, Scott wants revenge. He goes on a violent spree, but is injured during his pursuit.

programme.title: I (Almost) Got Away With It: Got a Gun Made of Toilet Paper
programme.desc: Kerry Silvers was facing 55 years in the slammer for robbery and battery, so he decided to escape. Along with two other prisoners they overpowered a few guards and were able to calmly walk out of prison.

programme.title: I (Almost) Got Away With It: Got Two Homes in Mexico
programme.desc: Gonzolo Martinez is a 17-year old gang member, sentenced to 48 years in prison. A chance arises, and Martinez escapes to Mexico and becomes a drug dealer. Only when Martinez tries to cross the border, do the feds get their chance to capture him.

programme.title: I (Almost) Got Away With It: Got to Fetch a Hooker
programme.desc: Lane Slettvet, a muscle man for a drug dealer, liked to test fate. One night on a job to pick up a prostitute, Slettvet stabs a man. He tries to stay under the radar, but still goes to parties for the drugs.

programme.title: Warrior POV: Tet Offensive
programme.desc: During the infamous Tet Offensive of 1968, an elite band of US Special Operations troops are called in to rescue dozens of helpless civilians trapped in the border town of Chau Doc, which has been captured by an overwhelming Viet Cong invasion force.

programme.title: Warrior POV: Search and Destroy
programme.desc: In a battle known as the Nine Days in May, the troops of the US 4th Infantry Division are on a search and destroy mission in Vietnam's Central Highlands when they run headlong into a massive force of North Vietnamese soldiers on the Cambodian border.

programme.title: Warrior POV: Road to Baghdad
programme.desc: See the shot by shot firefights in the 21 day bloody battle for Baghdad from the warrior's point of view.

programme.title: Forbidden History: The Real Mary Magdalene
programme.desc: A look at the story of Mary Magdalene, a key figure in Christianity.

programme.title: Forbidden History: The Dark Truths of the Templars
programme.desc: Templar fact and fiction have become blurred by their depictions in book and on film. However, we present a very different picture that challenges head on the orthodox beliefs about an order that angered much of Europe, particularly France.

programme.title: Top Ten Warfare: Inventions
programme.desc: From the mass production of life-saving Penicillin and pioneering Plastic Surgery, to the development of the Internet and GPS, this episode uses rare archive footage and expert interviews to identify and rank the most influential inventions of warfare.

programme.title: Top Ten Warfare: Weapons
programme.desc: The story of warfare in the modern age, from the legendary Spitfire to the stealth bombers of Iraq.

programme.title: Top Ten Warfare: Aircraft
programme.desc: Find out about aircraft important to conflicts in the 20th and 21st centuries.

programme.title: Top Ten Warfare: Battles
programme.desc: With incredible archive from the heart of the action, and interviews with world-leading historians, this action-packed episode counts down the most decisive battles of warfare that have been caught on camera.

programme.title: Top Ten Warfare: Vessels
programme.desc: This episode ranks the most iconic vessels of warfare of the last century. Featuring the German U-Boat, the Nimitz Aircraft Carriers, and the world's most successful battleship, these vessels have changed the face of warfare.

programme.title: Vintage Rehab: Colonial Meets Art Deco
programme.desc: After buying the vintage home of their dreams, a couple's plans of renovating fell by the wayside and they need help getting back on track. Ally's plans incorporate restored antique pieces while playing on the existing art deco accents.

programme.title: Barnwood Builders: Saving More than Logs in Bulls Gap, TN
programme.desc: Mark and the guys go the extra mile to save the antique logs from a Tennessee home in distress. During the job they meet Larry, who grew up in the log cabin with no running water.

programme.title: Barnwood Builders: Larry Melton's Chance of a Lifetime
programme.desc: The Barnwood Builders, after once saving Larry Melton's childhood home, do something they've never done before. They invite Larry to the Boneyard to help restore his family home. Mark also arranges a final surprise with some very special guests.

programme.title: Barnwood Builders: The Finished Product
programme.desc: Mark Bowe visits finished cabins he helped build in Montana, Texas, South Carolina, West Virginia and North Carolina. Then, there's a big surprise waiting for him in Gatlinburg, Tennessee.

programme.title: Barnwood Builders: The Johnny Jett Special
programme.desc: Machinist, artist and craftsman Johnny Jett is honoured by The Barnwood Builders in this one-hour special. Johnny's most unforgettable moments are highlighted as well as previously unaired footage featuring West Virginia's favorite Renaissance man.

programme.title: Barnwood Builders: Barn Storming: A Wild Takedown in Pleasantville, Ohio
programme.desc: Mark and the guys have fought rain, snow and heat, but they've never had winds like these! The vicious Ohio winds turn a complicated job into a treacherous one as they attempt to save a giant double pen barn.

programme.title: Barnwood Builders: Log Castle in Cave Spring, GA
programme.desc: The Barnwood Builders turn one of the biggest barns they've ever saved into an even bigger home. They work through sweltering heat to transform this Ohio double-pen barn. Mark visits a small log cabin with a lot of charm and gets a look at the dog trot.

programme.title: Barnwood Builders: New Hampshire Barn: The Whole Story
programme.desc: This one-hour special follows the move of a massive 1802 timber frame barn from New Hampshire to South Carolina, from complicated take-down, through an epic build, all the way to the dramatic finish visit.

programme.title: Treehouse Masters: Magical Modern Treehouse
programme.desc: Equipped with a 205 ft zipline entrance through the trees, Pete and his team work modern magic in Georgia.

programme.title: Treehouse Masters: Camo Treehouse
programme.desc: Pete goes commando for a treehouse build for clients passionate for competition and survivalist games. In a grove of 10 hackberry trees, Pete designs a camouflage structure with a luxurious interior that could pamper any hardened champion.

programme.title: Treehouse Masters: Texas-Sized Treehouse
programme.desc: Pete and the crew saddle up and ride on down to Leakey, TX, to build a colossal, Texas-sized treehouse. He rounds-up 'the magnificent seven' of cypresses alongside the banks of the Frio River and builds a treehouse with the longest bridge in NT&S history.

programme.title: Treehouse Masters: Frank Lloyd Lakehouse
programme.desc: Pete and the crew channel Frank Lloyd Wright for a triple-decker treehouse on the shores of Lake Barkley in Kentucky.

programme.title: Treehouse Masters: Apres Skihouse Treehouse
programme.desc: Pete designs a ski chalet treehouse that glistens as bright as the freshest powder atop a black diamond run. The 20-ft high winter retreat comes complete with a secret bedroom and a double-sided fireplace to keep guests warm both inside and out.

programme.title: Bargain Mansions: All About the Island
programme.desc: Tamara tackles a large 1905 colonial with seven sun porches. She overhauls an ugly kitchen and a dining room with tacky orange carpet, but unsupported floors and a strange noise during demo slow her plans and may cost her big money.

programme.title: Bargain Mansions: A Closet Fit for a Queen
programme.desc: Tamara creates a 900-square-foot master suite and converts one of the home's seven sun porches into a closet. However, her budget takes a hit when she needs to install a new HVAC unit and her plan to save a vintage fireplace might be out of gas.

programme.title: Bargain Mansions: All Bricked Out
programme.desc: Tamara takes an 1892 brick Craftsman that was converted into three apartments and tries to restore it back into a single-family dwelling while keeping original details.

programme.title: Bargain Mansions: The Swing of Things
programme.desc: Tamara continues working on an 1892 Craftsman and struggles to add a master bathroom. Then, she finds a way to repurpose floor boards into a porch swing, but her plan to reuse a clawfoot tub hits a snag because of a narrow doorway.

programme.title: Bargain Mansions: The Mural of the Story
programme.desc: Tamara works on restoring a 1909 Craftsman home, ripping out the tacky additions that have stripped it of its original charm. She saves a wallpaper mural that could be the showpiece of the dining room, if she can keep it from being destroyed.

programme.title: Bargain Mansions: Clowning Around
programme.desc: Tamara continues with the 1909 Craftsman, transforming a small bedroom into the master bath. She saves and refurbishes French doors, vintage sinks, and a tub from the house, while adding modern elements like a sauna.

programme.title: Bargain Mansions: Fireplaces and Wired Spaces
programme.desc: Tamara annexes an oversized dining room to enlarge a tiny kitchen in a 1926 English Tudor. She rips out an outdated and tacky mantel to create a stunning fireplace surround, and then creates a large desktop for an in-home office.

programme.title: Bargain Mansions: Two-deck Tudor
programme.desc: Tamara struggles to create a more spacious master suite until she decides to add a second deck to a 1926 English Tudor. In the backyard, she adds an outdoor living area with a fire pit. She and her dad then realize the garage doors may cause a problem.

programme.title: Cupcake Wars: Magical Cupcakes
programme.desc: Bakers trade in whisks for wands in hopes of showcasing at the Magic Castle.

programme.title: Cupcake Wars: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles
programme.desc: Husband and wife teams compete to serve their cupcakes at a cast and crew party for the new animated 'Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtle' series.

programme.title: Cupcake Wars: I Love Lucy 60th Anniversary
programme.desc: Bakers vie for a place at the celebration of the 60th anniversary of 'I Love Lucy'.

programme.title: Holiday Baking Championship: Signs of the Season

programme.title: Holiday Baking Championship: Grandma's Thanksgiving Favorites
programme.desc: When it comes to Thanksgiving, nobody can compete with grandma's signature recipes, so Clash of the Grandmas star Norma Zager joins Bobby Deen to lend her expertise to the remaining eight bakers.

programme.title: Holiday Baking Championship: Thanksgiving Joy
programme.desc: In the pre-heat, the remaining seven bakers must combine all of their favorite Thanksgiving desserts into one by creating elegant trifles. The bakers have to produce Thanksgiving imposter cupcakes.

programme.desc: Gophers and bunnies and butterflies oh my! Even a vegetarian will want to snack on these creatures. Catch cheerful Albanese gummy butterflies in action and pop in on Savannah Candy Kitchen's chocolate gophers.

programme.desc: It's sugar and spice and everything nice as host Alfonso Ribeiro shows how Sriracha hot sauce and Tina's Chimichangas amp up the spice factor in their tasty treats.

programme.title: Unwrapped 2.0: Little Bits
programme.desc: Alfonso Ribeiro explores little treats with big flavor like the colorful Carousel gumballs at Ford Gum, Ghirardelli Chocolate's decadent semi-sweet Baking Chips and the tasty Duchess Gem Donuts from Carolina Foods.

programme.title: Unwrapped 2.0: Backyard Cookout
programme.desc: Alfonso Ribeiro reveals the secrets behind heat-and-eat barbecue from Farm Rich Smokehouse, the super yellow color of French's Mustard and the sweet-sour punch of Mt. Olive Bread and Butter Pickles.

programme.title: Unwrapped 2.0: Quick Fix
programme.desc: Alfonso comes to the rescue with quick fixes. P.F. Chang's Home Menu Beef and Broccoli frozen entree makes weeknight meals easy and Chocolate Chip Quaker Chewy Bars are a great snack for kids and adults both.

programme.title: Man's Greatest Food: Beef
programme.desc: Roger Mooking showcases 12 of the tastiest beef dishes in restaurants across America from traditional Philly cheesesteaks and ribs to juicy steaks and entire steers.

programme.title: Man's Greatest Food: Island Eats
programme.desc: Roger Mooking searches the country for the 12 best island eats from lobster, conch and shellfish to low-country boils and key lime pies.

programme.title: Food Truck Nation: Smoked, Stuffed and Frozen Finds
programme.desc: Chef Brad Miller visits an Orange County food truck with a custom smoker on board. Then he heads to Austin, TX, to try classic Cajun dishes with a twist. Finally, in Los Angeles, he discovers an ice cream truck without a freezer.

programme.title: Food Truck Nation: Ribs, Ramen and Gooey Butter Cake
programme.desc: Brad Miller's food truck trek starts at Wood Shop BBQ in Seattle, where Chef Matt Davis serves up massive smoked beef ribs and chicken wings tossed in his special Kansas City-style barbecue sauce. Next up is the Hapa PDX truck in Portland, Ore.

programme.title: Food: Fact or Fiction?: Thanksgiving Winners

programme.title: Food: Fact or Fiction?: Some Like It Hot
programme.desc: Michael cranks up the heat on food myths, discovering who invented chili, if hot wings bond people closer together and if 'spicy' is just in our heads.

programme.title: Food: Fact or Fiction?: Hole in One
programme.desc: Michael McKean shares the 'hole' story of everyone's favorite middle-missing baked goods.

programme.title: Food: Fact or Fiction?: Rags to Riches
programme.desc: Michael McKean takes a look at how some favorite foods went from paupers to princes. He looks at lobster's prison past, whether creme brulee was always the cream of the crop, and if champagne's fizz almost burst its bubble.

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory: The Nerdvana Annihilation

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory: The Pork Chop Indeterminacy

programme.title: SciTech Now

programme.title: Native America: From Caves to Cosmos
programme.desc: Combine ancient wisdom and modern science to answer a 15,000-year-old question: who were America’s First Peoples? The answer hides in Amazonian cave paintings, Mexican burial chambers, New Mexico’s Chaco Canyon and waves off California’s coast.

programme.title: Native America: Nature to Nations
programme.desc: Explore the rise of great American nations, from monarchies to democracies. Investigate lost cities in Mexico, a temple in Peru, a potlatch ceremony in the Pacific Northwest and a tapestry of shell beads in upstate New York.

programme.title: Native America: Cities of the Sky
programme.desc: Discover the cosmological secrets behind America’s ancient cities. Scientists explore some of the world’s largest pyramids and 3D-scan a lost city of monumental mounds on the Mississippi River; native elders reveal ancient powers of the sky.

programme.title: Native America: New World Rising

programme.title: Gold Rush: Monster Red Lives
programme.desc: In search of big nuggets, Rick buys a monster washplant. A flood puts Tony's new claim in jeopardy. Parker needs to move Big Red in record time. Dustin's crew finds a claim, but must make it through the waterfall's pound zone. Fred introduces a new miner.

programme.title: Dirty Jobs: Cave Biologist
programme.desc: Mike Rowe works with a cave biologist and then braves the high seas in search of slime eels.

programme.title: Dirty Jobs: Mud Mineral Excavator
programme.desc: Mike Rowe gets dirty at a California mineral mine where everything seems to go wrong. Then he heads to a South Carolina rice plantation where he masters the art of milling rice.

programme.title: Dirty Jobs: Animal Rendering
programme.desc: Mike heads to Southern California to find out what it takes to keep a tar pit clean. Then Mike travels north where he learns about rendering and discovers how much of a farm animal can be recycled.

programme.title: Dirty Jobs: Tar Rigger
programme.desc: Mike heads to San Diego to get dirty with the tar rigging crew of the Star of India, the oldest active merchant ship in the world. Then, Mike takes a look back at some of the dirty tools he's used that make civilized life possible for the rest of us.

programme.title: Dirty Jobs: Diaper Cleaner
programme.desc: Mike journeys to Queen Creek, Arizona to press olives into oil and then heads to Sacramento, California to clean dirty diapers.

programme.title: Untold Stories of the ER: I'm So Dead
programme.desc: A woman stops eating because she believes she is dead. A runner goes blind in one eye during a marathon and takes a detour to the ER. Doctors are baffled by an ER tech's stroke-like symptoms, until someone he loves also becomes ill.

programme.title: Untold Stories of the ER: Doctor's Dilemma
programme.desc: A young pregnant woman in labour begs the ER doctor to keep her pregnancy and delivery a secret from her father. Twins share similar, confusing symptoms. A man with no pulse or blood pressure is still alive and breathing, mystifying his doctors.

programme.title: Untold Stories of the ER: Face Off
programme.desc: A woman's facelift goes terribly wrong. A hospital chaplain's sudden personality change baffles the ER staff. A pregnant woman's life-threatening symptoms need urgent treatment, but the doctor must convince others of the diagnosis he saw in her eyes.

programme.title: 90 Day Fiancé: Pillow Talk: They Don't Know
programme.desc: Tania races to meet Syngin at the airport in time for a special arrival. Anna introduces Mursel to her family, and reveals a secret. Emily and Sasha have a tense meeting with his ex-wife, and interview allegations may prevent Juliana from coming.

programme.title: 90 Day Fiancé: Deavan and Jihoon: Our Journey So Far

programme.title: Say Yes to the Dress: Atlanta: Twelve's a Crowd
programme.desc: Donnetta brought twelve friends to help her find a dress that puts her in the spotlight. But her unruly group make it difficult for the bride's voice be heard.

programme.title: Say Yes to the Dress: Atlanta: Up the Aunt-ie
programme.desc: Former beauty queen Macey wants a dress that differs from her old pageant gowns, but her bossy aunt insists on having the final say. Nikki and her aunt struggle to see eye to eye on her top gown pick. At her fitting, Hailee longs for her mom's approval.

programme.title: Say Yes to the Dress: Atlanta: Bringing Bridal Back
programme.desc: Leslie is looking for a dress that will let her dance the night away. After winning her cancer battle, Kayla is finally ready to plan her wedding, but her opinionated mother might stand in her way. Also, Samantha hopes her gown will still wow her fiancé.

programme.title: Say Yes to the Dress: Atlanta: Eye of the Bridal Storm
programme.desc: Legally blind bride Jessi argues with her overbearing mom about finding an age-appropriate dress. Passive bride Karen must make her voice heard above her opinionated pro-wrestler fiancé's. Bride Lindsay is exhausted after shopping with 13 bridesmaids.

programme.title: Say Yes to the Dress: Atlanta: Never Been Kissed
programme.desc: Daddy's little girl, Christina, is longing for a lace gown but her gruff father can't stand the look. Meanwhile, a consultant has her hands full trying to please a modest 17-year-old bride by pleasing her entire family.

programme.title: Say Yes to the Dress: Atlanta: Skin Can't Win
programme.desc: Kat comes into the salon with her heart set on a colourful, contemporary gown while her mother is the more traditional sort.

programme.title: Say Yes to the Dress: Atlanta: Bridal Floor Bullies
programme.desc: One Southern bride's traditional family wants to crush her dreams of a form-fitting, modern gown.

programme.title: Say Yes to the Dress: Atlanta: Mama Gets Her Groove Back
programme.desc: Carol's son can't stand the thought of his mama getting her groove on in a sexy gown.

programme.title: Say Yes to the Dress: Atlanta: Dream Dress or Bust
programme.desc: Two brides run into trouble as they try to show off what God - or a surgeon - gave them.

programme.title: Say Yes to the Dress: Atlanta: A Little Help From Her Friends
programme.desc: Snarky comments from Tamlyn's mom are keeping this bride down in the dumps and hiding out in the dressing room.

programme.title: Say Yes to the Dress: Atlanta: Gonna Sing You a Song 'Bout the Dress I Don't Have
programme.desc: With only 13 days until Stephanie's wedding, this country singer has to find the perfect dress. Krischell's online vision board boasts over 500 wedding dresses, which she must narrow down to one gown.

programme.title: Say Yes to the Dress: Atlanta: If I Feel Like a Penny, I Need to Look Like a Million
programme.desc: Bride Jennifer is a breast cancer survivor who wants to show off her curves, but Mom prefers her mounds to be covered. Bride Jasmine's mom has always questioned her style, but Lori suspects that's not the only reason she's doubting this bride's vision.

programme.title: Say Yes to the Dress: Atlanta: My Big Fat Ethiopian Wedding
programme.desc: Bride Saba needs a dress that fits her conservative Ethiopian culture, but still wants something fun and sexy for the reception. Bride Tiffany's family is too far away to help her shop, so Lori and Monte stand in for her Mom and Dad.

programme.title: Say Yes to the Dress: Atlanta: I'll Just Call Myself The Original Diva
programme.desc: According to bride Sarah's mom, they already found the perfect dress, but Sarah isn't convinced. Monte tries to find a dress they both love. Bride Comfort loves bling but her mom doesn't. Lori tries to fit both of their styles.

programme.title: Say Yes to the Dress: Atlanta: A Trio of Options
programme.desc: Bride Katy brought along her stylish Aunt Kristin to shop. Bride Genine falls in love with a dress but her sort-of-psychic friend isn't sure. Meanwhile Monte helps bride Gretchen tailor her dress to perfection.

programme.title: Say Yes to the Dress: Atlanta: A Little Sparkle Goes a Long Way
programme.desc: YouTube sensation and bride BFFTaylor won't feel satisfied with her dress until her mom cries. Olympian bride Kellie Wells comes in tow with Team Conservative and Team Sexy, and she must please them both or risk leaving empty-handed.

programme.title: Say Yes to the Dress: Atlanta: Are You Ready to Play Bridal Blitz?
programme.desc: Bride Precious falls in love with a grand ball gown, but her men of honour think it's a royal mistake. Bride Emily said yes to her fiancé after six weeks of dating, but finding the perfect dress in time for her upcoming wedding takes longer than expected.

programme.title: Say Yes to the Dress: Atlanta: Rockabilly and Motorcycles
programme.desc: Bride Jeanette wants a black dress but her parents are hoping for something less depressing. Bride Mackenzie’s 100-year-old dress didn't turn out as planned and with two weeks until her wedding day, she'll need one that won't blow her budget.

programme.title: Say Yes to the Dress: Atlanta: Waiting for a Sign
programme.desc: Lori and Monte hit the road with a pop-up salon in tow to surprise a very special bride who is getting married in just two days. Due to a recent tragedy, bride Anna has not taken the time to find a dress, but Team BBL is certain they can save the day.

programme.title: Say Yes to the Dress: Atlanta: 88 and Out at the Gate
programme.desc: Lori and Monte head to Nashville to help country artist Jimmy Stanley with a surprise proposal to fellow country singer Kristen Kelley. She also gets another surprise from Lori and Monte that she never sees coming.

programme.title: Say Yes to the Dress: Atlanta: Momma's Holdin' Back
programme.desc: Bride Shanna's outspoken mom has no intention of making her daughter's bridal appointment easy. Suzanne and her wedding planner differ on a bridal vision, which is challenging considering her teen daughter is her wedding planner.

programme.title: Say Yes to the Dress: Atlanta: Gone With the Wind Fabulous

programme.title: 90 Day Fiancé: I Want to Kiss You

programme.desc: The doctors help a female bodybuilder who wants to look more feminine, Paul performs surgery on a woman who has large nostril anxiety, and Katella Dash will do anything to look like a human blow-up doll.

programme.title: Botched: Man Boobs
programme.desc: Dr. Dubrow helps a mother who looks like she's been pregnant for 12 years, Dr. Nassif takes on a woman who hasn't been able to close her mouth since college and the doctors meet with a gambler with a serious case of man boobs.

programme.title: Botched: The Boobinati
programme.desc: Extra-large areolas force a sugar baby with 1600cc breasts to consult with the doctors. They also help a clumsy wife finally feel deserving of her husband by tacking her tricky nose.

programme.title: Botched: Viva Las Vegas Boobs
programme.desc: A woman visits the doctors to fix her scarred stomach and popped implant. Then, a police officer wants her nose fixed so she can look like her twin again.

programme.title: Botched: I Love New Boobs

programme.title: Holiday Baking Championship: Season of Sharing

programme.title: Martina's Table: Delaney's Birthday

programme.desc: Chef Bobby Flay keeps his Thanksgiving meal going with a brunch full of holiday flavors, making Pumpkin Lattes and Pumpkin-Spiced Granola Parfaits with Orange-Cranberry Jam and Maple Yogurt.

programme.desc: Instead of a killer dinner, Guy Fieri invites his chef friends to make finger foods, hors d'oeuvres and appetizers for cocktail hour at the ranch. Antonia Lofaso prepares cones of tender skirt steak with a chimichurri sauce and potato frites.

programme.title: Valerie's Home Cooking: Thankful For Family
programme.desc: When it comes to Thanksgiving Valerie really knows how to bring the people she loves together. She and Tom host both of their families for a Thanksgiving feast to remember.

programme.title: The Pioneer Woman: Frontier Friendsgiving
programme.desc: Ree's having some serious fun with recipes. There's a stunning turkey roulade rolled around sausage stuffing, then a leek and potato casserole.

programme.title: The Pioneer Woman: The Secrets in the Sides
programme.desc: The spotlight is on stunning sides for the big Thanksgiving Feast. Ree is making some of her all-time favorites, including broccoli wild rice casserole and soul sweet 'taters.

programme.title: The Pioneer Woman: Pioneer Woman's Ultimate Thanksgiving
programme.desc: It's a three-day countdown to the ultimate frontier-style Thanksgiving dinner, with Ree Drummond's delicious ideas for the perfect make-ahead family feast. Two days out, Ree starts on her Maple Whiskey Turkey, and stunning sides of cranberry sauce.

programme.title: Girl Meets Farm: Friendsgiving
programme.desc: Molly Yeh is whipping up fun takes on Thanksgiving classics for her Friendsgiving gathering on the farm. Her main dish is sweet and savory pomegranate glazed turkey legs, and she serves them with slow cooker greens and dumplings.

programme.title: Valerie's Home Cooking: Thanksgiving, SoCal-Style

programme.title: Barefoot Contessa: Cook Like a Pro: Thanksgiving New Ideas

programme.title: Giada's Holiday Handbook: Giada's Fall Festival
programme.desc: Giada kicks off the season with a harvest-themed festival for her neighbours. The games start with bobbing for apples, which they use to dip into melted caramel and toppings for dessert. The feast includes roasted squash and gorgonzola pizza.

programme.title: The Kitchen: Friendsgiving Favorites
programme.desc: Special guests Ted Allen, Christian Petroni and Martina McBride join a 'friendsgiving' filled with turkey day favourites. The star of the table is Jeff's sweet and spicy smoked turkey and gravy with Ted's side of triple sec cranberry relish.

programme.title: Ultimate Thanksgiving Challenge: Untraditional Thanksgiving
programme.desc: Giada De Laurentiis asks the five competing chefs to put a Thanksgiving spin on a classic dish. The winner gets an advantage in the dinner round, when the chefs have to create a Thanksgiving dinner infusing the flavours of a randomly assigned country.

programme.desc: Turkey-themed baskets keep the kid chefs in the right state of mind as they try to make a meal that guest judge David Dobrik will gobble up, starting with a bucket of turkey meatballs in round one.

programme.desc: Alan has concerns when Jake brings his 36-year-old girlfriend home for a visit. Meanwhile, Walden tries to keep a secret from Alan.

programme.title: Two and a Half Men: Throgwarten Middle School Mysteries

programme.title: Two and a Half Men: The 9:04 From Pemberton

programme.title: Two and a Half Men: Big Episode: Someone Stole a Spoon
programme.desc: Walden and Alan try to cheer up a lonely Herb, but end up partying a little too hard.

programme.title: Two and a Half Men: Bazinga! That's From a TV Show

programme.title: Two and a Half Men: Another Night With Neil Diamond
programme.desc: Alan has trouble coping when Lyndsey dumps him and Walden must find a way to help him get back on his feet.

programme.title: Two and a Half Men: My Bodacious Vidalia
programme.desc: When Walden encourages a depressed Alan to update his look and start dating again, Alan faces a moral dilemma when he attracts a married woman.

programme.title: Two and a Half Men: Cows, Prepare to Be Tipped
programme.desc: Walden dates a hot 22-year-old but finds himself more interested in her grandmother. Meanwhile, Alan and Jake go on a father-son bonding trip.

programme.title: Two and a Half Men: Nangnangnangnang

programme.title: Two and a Half Men: I Think I Banged Lucille Ball
programme.desc: When Walden feels cramped in his own house, Jenny moves in with Evelyn and her boyfriend, Marty. Meanwhile, Alan becomes Lyndsey's 'other man.'

programme.title: Two and a Half Men: This Unblessed Biscuit
programme.desc: Walden and Alan think it may be time for Berta to retire when she injures her back at work.

programme.title: Two and a Half Men: Clank, Clank, Drunken Skank
programme.desc: Walden starts partying with Jenny and her hot friends. Meanwhile, Alan and Lyndsey’s illicit affair is jeopardized.

programme.title: Two and a Half Men: Alan Harper, Pleasing Women Since 2003
programme.desc: Alan befriends Lyndsey’s boyfriend in an effort to find out what he has that Alan doesn’t. Meanwhile, Walden helps Jenny be more proactive in pursuing her acting career.

programme.title: Two and a Half Men: Justice in Star-Spangled Hot Pants
programme.desc: When Alan learns Walden knows Lynda Carter, he asks him to set him up on a date with her. Against his better judgment, Walden agrees to invite her to the house for dinner.

programme.title: Two and a Half Men: Some Kind of Lesbian Zombie
programme.desc: Walden and Alan find themselves on dates with two ideal women until Lyndsey’s jealousy throws a wrench in their evening.

programme.title: The New Adventures of Old Christine: Honey, I Ran Over the Kid
programme.desc: Christine accuses Richard of bad parenting when Ritchie gets hurt at a skateboarding party. She soon surpasses him as the worse parent when her over-protectiveness backfires.

programme.title: The New Adventures of Old Christine: Too Close for Christine
programme.desc: Christine is initially flattered when another scatterbrained mother at Ritchie's school considers her a 'rock,' but quickly tires of the responsibility of being responsible.

programme.title: The New Adventures of Old Christine: A Change of Heart/ Pants
programme.desc: Christine and Richard help Marly and Lindsay through labour, evoking memories of Ritchie's birth and renewing romantic feelings.

programme.title: The New Adventures of Old Christine: Hair

programme.title: The New Adventures of Old Christine: He Ain't Heavy

programme.desc: Blanche tries to cheer up a lonely Dorothy by taking her out to her favourite bar.

programme.title: The Golden Girls: A Midwinter Night's Dream
programme.desc: An ancient family curse requires Sophia to save Dorothy by performing strange tasks.

programme.title: The Golden Girls: A Midwinter Night's Dream
programme.desc: The full moon and festivities prompt strange happenings including Blanche's jewelry being swiped, Sophia trying to break a curse, and Dorothy and Miles sharing a passionate kiss.

programme.desc: Blanche has a date and tries to dump her visiting uncle Lucas on Dorothy. Later, to get revenge, Dorothy and Lucas play a trick on Blanche by telling her they're getting married. Rose announces she plans on moving, Lucas decides to reveal the truth.

programme.title: Crikey! It's the Irwins: Road Trip Rescue
programme.desc: Carrying three baby kangaroos and an emu, the Irwins caravan into the Australian Outback to release the animals on Mourachan, their giant wildlife conservation property. Plans shift when they discover more animals in need of rescue along the way.

programme.title: Crikey! It's the Irwins: Big Day for Baby Rhino
programme.desc: Terri helps prepare the zoo's new baby rhino to receive a lifesaving vaccine. Robert is on a rescue mission to save two black swans in very bad shape. Bindi tries to determine if a cranky wombat named Poa might be pregnant.

programme.title: Crikey! It's the Irwins: Crocodile Love Story
programme.desc: It's moving day for Acco, the zoo's biggest crocodile. All goes to plan until his mate Cassie goes into hiding as the team races to reunite the bonded pair in their new enclosure. The rescue unit fights to save a flying fox entangled in barbed wire.

programme.title: Crikey! It's the Irwins: Extra Bites: Oscar the Grouchy Frogmouth
programme.desc: Terri returns to her hometown in Oregon to help Brady, a cougar in need of a vital health check. At the zoo, Robert is on a mission to rescue Oscar, a small bird with a big attitude, and Bindi bathes an echidna with bad skin allergies.

programme.title: Crikey! It's the Irwins: Swimming with Steve
programme.desc: Bindi swims alongside whale sharks, assisting with research efforts on the world's latest and least understood fish. Robert work to save an echidna that's tightly trapped under a fridge. Terri joins a closeup exam on a grizzly.

programme.title: Pit Bulls & Parolees: Sisters in Rescue
programme.desc: When a 3-legged dog has trouble finding a forever home, Amanda Giese from Panda Paws Rescue comes to New Orleans to help. Parolee Troy shares some life changing news with Tia and the VRC crew. And, Villalobos helps an employee's dad find a new companion.

programme.title: Amanda to the Rescue: Pit-Bull and Panda
programme.desc: Amanda works with Tia of Pit Bulls and Parolees to rescue a three-legged shepherd mix as part of a road trip rescue mission. She picks up 16 dogs along the way, including a young lab with a brain issue and a puppy mill survivor.

programme.title: Amanda to the Rescue: It's Raining Cats!
programme.desc: Felines take over when Amanda helps an energetic kitten facing euthanasia after breaking his leg for a second time, along with a tiny kitten born with malformed front legs. A three-legged husky-rottweiler puppy needs a forever home.

programme.title: Tanked!: Fernando Vargas's Knockout Tank

programme.title: Tanked!: Dwight Howard's Slamming Snake Tank: Supersized
programme.desc: Dwight Howard is back again for his second, third, fourth tank and more. This basketball legend has moved since the guys last saw him and he needs the guys at ATM to design and build a habitat for all 14 of his snakes.

programme.title: Tanked!: Clay Matthews' Green Bay Eel Tank
programme.desc: Clay Matthews from the Green Bay Packers is in the process of building his dream home and it wouldn't be complete without a custom tank. Clay's wife wants the interior to stay classy but with subtle references to his Green Bay playing career.

programme.title: Tanked!: Ty Dolla's Fresh Tank
programme.desc: Hip-hop artist Ty Dolla $ign wants a tank in his house in Long Beach. He calls in Wayde and Brett to construct a huge freshwater tank. Complete with a real rock insert, perfect replicas of Ty's awards, and embedded into a wall.

programme.title: Tanked!: Kevin Smith's Tortally Awesome Tank
programme.desc: Things are about to get fishy for world famous Filmmaker, Kevin Smith. He has two turtles and one tortoise that desperately need a new home. Kevin dreams of a tank that can house both of these species but they require two different living environments.

programme.title: Tanked!: Country Superstar Surprise!

programme.title: Tanked!: Howie Mandel's Surprise Tank

programme.title: Just Roll With It: The Elevator

programme.title: Jessie: A Close Shave

programme.title: Jessie: But Africa Is So ... Fari

programme.title: Jessie: Karate Kid-tastrophe

programme.title: Bunk'd: Boo Boos and Birthdays

programme.title: Bunk'd: There's No Place Like Camp

programme.title: Jessie: Romancing the Crone

programme.title: Jessie: The Princess and the Pea Brain

programme.title: Miraculous: Tales of Ladybug and Cat Noir: Volpina

programme.title: Animal Fight Night: Fangs of Fury

programme.title: Animal Fight Night: Africa's Deadliest

programme.title: Animal Fight Night: Clash of Titans

programme.title: Animal Fight Night: Winner Takes All

programme.title: Animal Fight Night: Release the Beast
programme.desc: Witness what happens when animals face off and fight for power.

programme.title: Dr. T, Lone Star Vet: The Terrible Turkey Trot

programme.title: Dr. T, Lone Star Vet: Mother of Dragons

programme.title: Dr. T, Lone Star Vet: Bunny 911
programme.desc: Dr. T sees an itchy bird, a dragon with rich taste and a pair of baby sugar gliders.

programme.title: Mysteries of the Abandoned: Alien Hell Portal
programme.desc: A strange complex of tunnels on the grounds of a bizarre mansion was under lock-and-key for a century, and since its rediscovery, some believe its mysterious place is a gate to hell. New discoveries reveal its secret purpose and why it was abandoned.

programme.title: Mysteries of the Abandoned: Kingdom of the Vanished
programme.desc: A mysterious town in the hills of South Africa was once a booming community, but today, the eerie place is deserted. Experts reveal the cataclysm that caused the people of this once-prosperous town to suddenly leave and never come back.

programme.title: Mysteries of the Abandoned: Pompeii's Gate to Hell

programme.title: Mysteries of the Abandoned: Journey to Outcast Island
programme.desc: On a desolate island near Greece, abandoned buildings are evidence of a group of people that were forbidden to leave. Experts reveal who was forced to stay here and if there was a cover-up to conceal what really happened at this strange place.

programme.title: Impossible Engineering: World's Greatest Bridges

programme.title: Building Giants: Rise of the Monster Bridge
programme.desc: As expert engineers race against the clock to build the biggest bridge in Ireland, they use cutting-edge tech and innovative construction methods in a fight against unpredictable weather and deadly heights to complete the massive project on time.

programme.title: Impossible Engineering: US Army's Super Tank
programme.desc: The US Army's Abrams tank is a 70-ton war machine capable of reaching speeds of 45 miles per hour on the most extreme terrains on earth, but before it enters the battlefield, it must face a set of brutal challenges to put its engineering to the test.

programme.title: Impossible Engineering: Himalayan Mega Train
programme.desc: Engineers braved a deadly Himalayan environment to build this world's tallest railway, which connects one of the world's most inaccessibly cities to the world beyond the ice.

programme.title: Jacked: Auto Theft Task Force: I Was Gonna Go Home
