programme.title: Jacked: Auto Theft Task Force: Nothing Good Happens After Midnight
programme.desc: The Task force realizes that finding cars are not their only job. They take down robbers, and then search for a man with a gun.

programme.title: Deadly Women: The Blame Game
programme.desc: Some women can't admit their failings. They point the finger of blame at others.

programme.title: Deadly Women: Granny Gets a Gun
programme.desc: A woman disapproves of her granddaughter's new boyfriend and plots to eliminate him.

programme.title: Deadly Women: Sugar and Spite
programme.desc: They look sugar coated, but these deadly women are anything but.

programme.title: Valley of the Damned: Killer Confession
programme.desc: When Lea Porter goes missing in Prison Valley her family turn detective to try and find her. Their investigation leads to a shocking discovery - the killer's true identity. As the killer evades arrest, Lea's brother devises a plan to make him confess.

programme.title: Valley of the Damned: The Absent Father
programme.desc: When Jim Durgan's body is found in Prison Valley, no one knows why. His estranged wife is drawing a blank and his out-of-state girlfriend can't explain it. What follows is a murky investigation that unravels a sinister and cleverly staged murder plot.

programme.title: Valley of the Damned: The Jehovah Jinx
programme.desc: Jehovah's Witness Pam Candelario is murdered during a home invasion and her husband Ralph is brutally beaten. But what appears to be a home invasion soon turns into one of the most bizarre murder cases that police have ever encountered.

programme.title: Highway to Hell: The Last Ride
programme.desc: Truck driver Bob Nelson is a week from completing his final cross-country ride before returning to his family and celebrating his 25th wedding anniversary. When he fails to show, cops discover his abandoned truck and a crime scene that raises questions.

programme.title: 20/20 on ID: Rehab Mogul
programme.desc: He was the owner of more than 20 drug treatment facilities in two states. But some former clients claim the man dubbed 'Rehab Mogul,' Chris Bathum, was a drug user and sexual predator. They say he didn't help their recovery, he derailed it.

programme.title: Valley of the Damned: The Jehovah Jinx
programme.desc: Jehovah's Witness Pam Candelario is murdered during a home invasion and her husband Ralph is brutally beaten. But what appears to be a home invasion soon turns into one of the most bizarre murder cases that police have ever encountered.

programme.title: Highway to Hell: The Last Ride

programme.title: 20/20 on ID: Rehab Mogul

programme.title: Valley of the Damned: The Absent Father
programme.desc: When Jim Durgan's body is found in Prison Valley, no one knows why. His estranged wife is drawing a blank and his out-of-state girlfriend can't explain it. What follows is a murky investigation that unravels a sinister and cleverly staged murder plot.

programme.title: People Magazine Investigates: The Darkest of Nights
programme.desc: In 2004, the small town of Craig, Alaska is shocked when police discover the charred body of beloved mother and wife Lauri Waterman. People have no idea who would want to kill her, until an unlikely witness reveals a sordid story of secrets and lies.

programme.title: People Magazine Investigates: Hollywood Horror Story
programme.desc: In 2012, hikers in Los Angeles' Hollywood Hills discover the severed head of Hervey Medellin, a retired flight clerk. The cast of suspects includes former lovers, drug cartels and a murderous porn star, in a tale of lust, greed and butchery.

programme.title: Truth About Murder With Sunny Hostin: Always Be Mine
programme.desc: A young mother is shot execution-style in her kitchen while her daughter cries in the next room. It will take a full team effort from the investigators and prosecution to wade through the intricate web of lies the killer weaves to reveal the truth.

programme.title: Truth About Murder With Sunny Hostin: Terrible Place to Die
programme.desc: A stranger brutally attacks two young women in a park in Portland, Texas. One victim is killed, while the other, miraculously survives. With the help of the survivor, investigators desperately hunt for the killer before he can strike again.

programme.title: Truth About Murder With Sunny Hostin: Death Ride
programme.desc: A young mother's lifeless body is found floating deep in the Louisiana bayou and local police are stumped as to how she wound up dead nearly 300 miles from her Texas home. There is little physical evidence, and there are no eye-witnesses.

programme.title: Ice Cold Killers: Fire and Ice
programme.desc: A woman's body is found burned to death in a burning car. As the smoke settles, police arrive and find an abandoned car seat in the back seat. Investigators are frantic to find the child and fear a vicious killer lurks in Minneapolis.

programme.title: Ice Cold Killers: Open Season
programme.desc: On a frigid fall evening, a hunter in Missouri is found shot to death. Freak hunting accident or cold and calculating homicide? As the mysterious case unfolds, police uncover a web of infidelity and lies, leading to the least likely of suspects.

programme.title: Ice Cold Killers: Winter Blaze
programme.desc: After a house fire lights up a Wisconsin night, firefighters find the bodies of a woman and two kids, with evidence they'd been bound before the blaze. Police learn the victim's infant son is missing and must scramble to find the deadly kidnappers.

programme.title: Dead of Winter: The Empty Chair
programme.desc: The day after a snowstorm, high school freshman Shaun Ouillette vanishes. His mother searches for three desperate weeks. But when an anonymous letter leads detectives into the frozen woods, they make a discovery that will tear the small town apart.

programme.title: Dead of Winter: Winter's Bone
programme.desc: A pastor discovers a bartender's strangled corpse in the snow, just days before Christmas. Suspicion turns toward the bartender's best friend, but detectives aren't quite sure.

programme.title: Dead of Winter: Midnight Mass
programme.desc: In Evansville, Indiana, a family of four is murdered in their home. Detectives launch a manhunt to find the deranged killer.

programme.title: Dead of Winter: The Widows of Winter
programme.desc: 74-year-old widow Virginia Johannessen is shot dead in her home; then, another widow is murdered on the same street. Is someone targeting widows on Felton Road? As police unravel the truth, they discover they've made a chilling mistake.

programme.title: FBI Takedowns: Catching Crazy
programme.desc: A cop-shooting fugitive terrorizes banks in South Jersey. To smoke him out, the FBI teams with a local detective and an ex-cop informant. Even with the perfect trap, this crazy criminal isn't about to go down without a fight.

programme.title: Whitey Bulger: Final Takedown
programme.desc: In 1995 ruthless murderer and Boston crime boss James 'Whitey' Bulger flees Boston to escape an impending arrest. State police, the FBI and US Marshals all join an international hunt for this violent fugitive.

programme.title: FBI Takedowns: Sadistic Mastermind
programme.desc: A sadistic criminal mastermind forces his victims to make a cruel choice: rob a bank or watch their family die. The FBI will need to take extraordinary measures to bringing this villain down before a chilling prophecy is fulfilled.

programme.title: FBI Takedowns: Terrorist in Texas
programme.desc: The FBI's Joint Terrorism Task Force in Dallas, TX goes undercover to stop a homegrown terrorist from killing thousands of Americans. To neutralize this violent jihadist, the FBI will have to build a weapon of mass destruction of its own design.

programme.title: The Mafia's Black Sheep
programme.desc: In the lawless days of Prohibition America one gangster stands out as the black sheep Dutch Schultz. When Dutch threatens to kill a state prosecutor the mob can't risk the fallout.

programme.title: The Renegade Mobster
programme.desc: Crazy Joey Gallo psychopathic killer, beatnik hipster and renegade mobster. Burning with rage and determined to make his way to the top, he wages all-out war against the US and sparks a revolution in the mafia before going down in a hail of bullets.

programme.title: The Mob Cops
programme.desc: In the 1980's and 90's the mafia controls the New York criminal underworld. But by the early 2000's evidence surfaces that the mob has gone much further and has people inside the NYPD. Now a dedicated team of detectives must find out who are the Mob Cops.

programme.title: The Last Don
programme.desc: Joe Massino, the 'Last Don', crushes anyone who goes against the mafia code of omerta. Loyalty to his family, and obedience to their code of silence, is everything. But when the Feds take Massino down, Massino takes everyone down with him.

programme.title: America: Facts vs. Fiction: Bonus Round: Discovering America
programme.desc: Explore the truth behind the men who discovered the New World and take a trip to discover the real facts behind the most famous bridge and road in America.

programme.title: America: Facts vs. Fiction: Bonus Round: Monumental Realities
programme.desc: The myths behind some of history's most defining moments are uncovered, as well as revealing facts behind America's space explorations.

programme.title: America: Facts vs. Fiction: Bonus Round: Science or Sci-Fi?
programme.desc: The science in our nation's history is examined. Explore the myths that infect America's medical history and learn the facts behind America's nuclear age.

programme.title: Secrets of the Arsenal: Courage Under Fire
programme.desc: Four stories of courage under fire; a symbol of luck saves Marines in Korea; a handheld weapon protects Europe during the Cold War; an instrument sends a ship off to its depths and a letter helps write victory during the Revolutionary War.

programme.title: Weaponology: SAS
programme.desc: The SAS go behind enemy lines and have revolutionised the global war on terrorism.

programme.title: Weaponology: Green Berets
programme.desc: Green Berets are the lords of unconventional warfare. From bolt-action rifles, to the latest air strike laser technology, Green Berets are the masters of multiple weapons systems. See how they operate under the most extreme conditions throughout history.

programme.title: Weaponology: Rangers
programme.desc: US Army Rangers are the men of steel forged in the fire of every major conflict from the beaches of D-Day to the streets of Baghdad. Weaponology takes you through time to show how the Rangers always ride the cutting edge of military technology.

programme.title: What History Forgot: Rebels With a Cause
programme.desc: Rosa parks was not the first African American women to refuse to give up her seat. The Berlin Airlift included candy for kids. One of the great rifles used in war was invented by a man who made moonshine.

programme.title: What History Forgot: Verge of Destruction
programme.desc: We've all heard about the fallout shelters used for refuge during World War II, the deadly firebombing of Tokyo, and the D-Day invasion on the beaches of Normandy but there are more secrets.

programme.title: What History Forgot: Secret Weapons

programme.title: Bargain Mansions: The Trouble With Cobbles
programme.desc: Tamara continues work on a French chateau as she overhauls a large master suite covered in the tackiest wallpaper she's ever ripped out. She plans to move a bathroom to create an additional bedroom and extend a hallway.

programme.title: Bargain Mansions: From Studs to Spindles
programme.desc: Tamara Day steps in to finish the renovation of a 1890s Craftsman-style home. This home was previously ripped down to the studs by a contractor before it was abandoned.

programme.title: Bargain Mansions: Book Lamps and Bubble Glass
programme.desc: Renovations on the 1890s Craftsman-style home continues as Tamara enlarges the master bedroom and creates a beautiful study. She runs into trouble when the antique tiles for the bathroom floor are not salvageable. Tamara finds a way to re-use old glass.

programme.title: Bargain Mansions: The Heart of the Home
programme.desc: Tamara Day tackles the battered kitchen of her new property, an 1897 bungalow. She enlarges and modernizes the space while preserving traditional elements of a bungalow kitchen.

programme.title: Bargain Mansions: How Suite It Is
programme.desc: Tamara Day transforms a bedroom as she continues renovating an 1897 bungalow. Knowing modern buyers expect a master suite, Tamara annexes a second room to enlarge the tiny closet and add a bathroom.

programme.title: Bargain Mansions: Move That Kitchen
programme.desc: Tamara renovates a single-story ranch and tackles her biggest challenge to date, transforming the former master bedroom into a stunning, open kitchen. However, she and her dad run into problems during demolition.

programme.title: Bargain Mansions: Copper Showstopper
programme.desc: Tamara continues renovations on the ranch by creating a new master suite. While polishing the copper fireplace hood, Tamara and her dad use a familiar solution that has unusual results. Her plans to create a sunroom run into problems due to weather.

programme.title: Building Off the Grid: Ozark Paradise
programme.desc: A realtor and his three children set out to build their dream home together on a wooded ridge top in the Ozark Mountains of Oklahoma.

programme.title: Building Off the Grid: Floating Castle
programme.desc: Marine scientists in Florida hire engineers Nicolas Derouin and Arnaud Luguet to create a first-of-its-kind floating home. They have nine months to complete it, but unpredictable weather and building hiccups may sink this project before it can swim.

programme.title: Building Off the Grid: Alaskan Glacier
programme.desc: Alaskan adventure guide Don Lee is building a remote survival cabin on top of a glacier where no man has stepped before. But in an area plagued with avalanches and unpredictable weather, this fearless bushman needs to time his construction perfectly.

programme.title: Building Off the Grid: Desert Domes
programme.desc: Laura Williams is on a mission to build an off-the-grid home in the desert outside of Tucson, Arizona. She builds an earthen three-dome home by hand battling a steep learning curve and Mother Nature.

programme.title: Barnwood Builders: Log Castle in Cave Spring, GA
programme.desc: The Barnwood Builders turn one of the biggest barns they've ever saved into an even bigger home. They work through sweltering heat to transform this Ohio double-pen barn. Mark visits a small log cabin with a lot of charm and gets a look at the dog trot.

programme.title: Barnwood Builders: Victory Lap
programme.desc: Mark Bowe returns to the finished homes of some of his favourite 'Barnwood Builders' jobs. After months of work, the 100% cabin, Rose's cabin, the Boy Scout cabin and many more are living new lives as modern homes.

programme.title: Barnwood Builders: Bird's-Eye Barn
programme.desc: The guys take down a massive double-pen barn in southern Indiana. While they work to save every log and barn board, Mark visits an incredible lodge built from a different barn they took down in nearby St. Meinrad.

programme.title: Barnwood Builders: Island Fishing Cabin
programme.desc: Mark Bowe and the Barnwood Builders take the logs from season 3's Bird's-Eye Barn across the New River and put them back together on a West Virginia island.

programme.title: Barnwood Builders: Restoration Week
programme.desc: The crew restores two cabins and builds a barn door for their blacksmith shop. Mark Bowe scouts an old log cabin and drives through a river to visit the fishing cabin he and his crew built two years ago.

programme.title: Texas Flip and Move: Suzi's Custom Bling Closet Remodel
programme.desc: Cody and Suzi Slay win a house that has great potential, despite a weird layout that has no usable closets. Suzi decides to have Cody build a luxury walk-in closet modeled after her closet at home. Meanwhile, the Snows make money moving school buildings.

programme.title: Texas Flip and Move: Shipping Container House vs. Studio Loft House
programme.desc: Randy outfoxes the others for an old school house, but it turns out to be empty. Donna gives him grief and bets she could flip a storage container for more money than Randy will make on the house.

programme.title: Texas Flip and Move: Glam Cabin vs. Rooster Reno
programme.desc: A house on Foster Drive in Lake Worth Texas is a quaint stone-clad house with a small addition. The Slays want to turn it into a hunting cabin. Randy takes a 1960s style house that will require significant renovation.

programme.title: Texas Flip and Move: The Slay's School Building Transformation vs. the Snow Sister's Reconditioned Quick Flip
programme.desc: The Snow sisters win a house that is in fantastic condition, meaning they can make a big profit on a quick and easy flip. The Slays turn a portable school building into a combination home and workshop.

programme.title: Good Eats: Tuna, Surprise!
programme.desc: Alton Brown raises the bar on canned tuna beyond the usual casserole or tuna sandwich.

programme.title: Good Eats: Fry Turkey Fry
programme.desc: Alton takes on the deep-frying turkey tradition to prevent future disasters.

programme.title: Good Eats: Romancing the Bird
programme.desc: Alton Brown tries to throw off the dry turkey curse that's haunted his family for ages. Secrets to a juicy turkey that cooks in just two hours.

programme.title: Iron Chef America: Garces vs. Fukushima and Garcia
programme.desc: Chefs Fukushima and Garcia challenge Chef Garces.

programme.title: Iron Chef America: Zakarian Vs. Wolen

programme.title: Iron Chef America: Morimoto vs. Chauhan
programme.desc: Chicago based Chef Maneet Chauhan enters kitchen stadium with an Indian cuisine background and the thirst to take on Iron Chef Morimoto.

programme.title: Unique Eats: Drinks
programme.desc: Visit a java boutique where coffee drinks come in unique flavours.

programme.title: Unique Eats: Small Plates

programme.title: Unique Eats: Local Legends
programme.desc: These restaurants have quickly become famous food destinations and local legends. Ogunquit, Maine, Cleveland Ohio, Baltimore Maryland, and San Francisco. Unique and pioneering dishes that turn first time costumers into long-time fans.

programme.title: Unique Sweets: Toronto Sweets
programme.desc: We head north of the border to Toronto.

programme.title: Unique Sweets: Sweet Mornings in Sunny L.A.
programme.desc: Visit some Los Angeles hotspots that are the sweetest places to start the day.

programme.title: Unique Sweets: L.A. Sweets
programme.desc: We've got the fried, the frozen, and the fabulous! It's a tour of the sweetest spots in Los Angeles. At Republique, French pastries are expertly crafted, and totally addictive.

programme.title: Unique Sweets: Morning Munchies
programme.desc: We're going on an ocean-hopping journey from Hawaii to the mainland for some magnificent morning munchies.

programme.title: Bizarre Foods: Delicious Destinations: Quito
programme.desc: Andrew Zimmern explores the diverse culinary classics of Ecuador's capital city, Quito. The urban cuisine satisfies stomachs with fried pork and potato cakes, fresh ceviche, sugar-coated roasted peanuts, fish soup and more.

programme.title: Bizarre Foods: Delicious Destinations: Cape Town
programme.desc: Andrew Zimmern leaves no meal unexplored in multicultural Cape Town, South Africa, where meat comes in all forms, from sausage to stew to pie. The coastal city's seafood is out of this world, and the favorite pastry is nothing without a coat of syrup!

programme.title: Bizarre Foods: Delicious Destinations: Trinidad And Tobago
programme.desc: Andrew samples the island flavors and culinary mashups of Trinidad and Tobago. These islands have a passion for food and life, featuring dishes like curried crab with dumplings, crispy fried shark sandwiches and soft and silky flatbreads.

programme.title: Bizarre Foods: Delicious Destinations: Dallas
programme.desc: Andrew Zimmern explores the big and bold flavors that are decidedly Dallas. From comforting chicken fried steak and sweet, creamy pecan pie to hearty tortilla soup and steak aged for 240 days.

programme.title: Extreme Cake Makers: A Tall Order Of Cakes
programme.desc: Molly goes under the big top to create a cake design that will raise funds for a local charity. Ben uses his skills as a former tattoo artist to make a permanent good impression for his clients.

programme.title: Extreme Cake Makers: An Edible Portrait on a Cake Canvas
programme.desc: Baker Molly Robbins focuses on bringing to life a large cake beach scene complete with jelly sea, crispy marshmallow rocks and dozens of hand-carved sunbathers.

programme.title: Holiday Cookie Builds: Tricked-out Turkey
programme.desc: A local figure skating team asks Brenda Nibley and Alisha Nuttall to make a giant edible skating rink with fondant figurines for a surprise party for their beloved coach, and the cake artists have to figure out how to make the skaters move on the ice.

programme.title: Crazy Cookie Builds: School House and Stadium Builds
programme.desc: To celebrate an elementary school's reading program, Brenda and Elisa design and build a giant Alphabet Schoolhouse for the students' party. Then, in honour of a university football coach's 100th win, Brenda and Elisa design a gingerbread replica stadium.

programme.title: Cupcake Wars: Fan Favorites
programme.desc: All-star bakers compete to serve at a celebrity packed gala hosted by Lance Bass.

programme.desc: Schwoz accidentally morphs Charlotte into half girl/ half octopus, Captain Man and Kid Danger work to change her back but first they must catch her. The group's vacation is cut short when Jasper falls into a volcano and is held captive by the Volcaniacs.

programme.title: The Adventures of Kid Danger: The Sushi Sitter/ Cheer Beast
programme.desc: Captain Man must save Kid Danger from Drillfinger with the only tool he has: a motorized toilet.

programme.title: The Adventures of Kid Danger: Tiny Toddler/ Magical Beefery Tour
programme.desc: After misplacing the shrink ray, Captain Man and Kid Danger have to battle The Toddler to win it back. Captain man and Kid Danger find a golden pickle in their burger which wins them a private tour of the secretive factory where Beefo's Burgers are made.

programme.title: The Adventures of Kid Danger: Snooze Pods/ Sticky Vicky
programme.desc: Jasper becomes trapped in a dream using one of Schwoz's Snooze Pods. Henry's field trip to the Museum of Celebrity Garbage is cut short by the arrival of Sticky Vicky.

programme.title: The Adventures of Kid Danger: The Wahoo Punch Bro/ Pink Rocket
programme.desc: When the Wahoo Punch Bro is running amok through Swellview, Captain Man and Kid Danger must find a way to stop him. When Mitch Bilsky mocks Henry's kiddie motor scooter, Ray sets up a race between Henry and Mitch to prove whose transportation is faster.

programme.title: Mickey Mouse Shorts: Carried Away/ Gone to Pieces/ For Whom the Booth Tolls
Mickey Mouse Shorts: Natures Wonderland/ Shipped Out/ The Birthday Song
Mickey Mouse Shorts: House Painters/ Over The Moon/ Our Homespun Melody
Mickey Mouse Shorts: Bee Inspired/ Swimmin' Hole/ Year of the Dog
Big City Greens: Photo Op/ Remy Rescue
programme.desc: Bill promises his family a trip to the mall food court but tricks them into going to a family portrait studio. Remy skips his violin lesson to hang out with Cricket.

programme.title: Big City Greens: Space Chicken/ Steak Night
programme.desc: To impress his new neighbors, Cricket attempts to launch a chicken into space. The Greens are excited to continue their traditional monthly steak dinner, but Cricket accidentally loses the steaks on the subway.

programme.title: Amphibia: Family Fishing Trip/ Bizarre Bazaar
programme.desc: Sprig wants to spend time with Hop Pop on their family fishing trip, but Hop Pop's friend Sylvia gets in the way. Anne's music box goes missing at the mysterious and exclusive Bizarre Bazaar.

programme.title: Hotel Transylvania: The Series: Wendy Big and Tall/ Doppelfanger
programme.desc: Mavis accidentally turns Wendy into a ginormous, blobby version of her little self. Mavis' teen crush, Jett Black, visits the hotel.

programme.title: DuckTales: Moonvasion!
programme.desc: Donald Duck and his nephews are reunited with Scrooge after moving into McDuck Manor.

programme.title: Movie: Percy Jackson and the Olympians: The Lightning Thief
programme.desc: Someone has stolen the ultimate weapon: Zeus's lightning bolt. When Percy, the son of Poseidon, is accused of the theft, he must find and return the bolt to Zeus before the battle of the gods destroys the world. Along the way, he learns of his lineage.

programme.title: Phineas and Ferb: The Beak
programme.desc: A Super Villain challenges Phineas and Ferb after mistaking them for super heroes.

programme.title: Big Hero 6: The Series: Nega-Globby
programme.desc: Honey Lemon sets out to cure Globby and make him human again. However, Big Hero 6 must now face a new different evil glob-like villain.

programme.title: Big Hero 6: The Series: The Globby Within
programme.desc: Nega-Globby begins to take control of Globby’s body in order to cause chaos around the city turning Globby from adored hero to a wanted criminal overnight!

programme.title: Amphibia: Toad Tax/ Prison Break
programme.desc: Anne befriends toad soldiers to gain respect in Wartwood, but must choose between her new respect and her frog family. Far from Wartwood, Anne’s friend Sasha is captured by toads.

programme.title: DuckTales: From the Confidential Casefiles of Agent 22!
programme.desc: Scrooge contends with stowaway Webby during a covert operation to rescue Beakley.

programme.title: Gravity Falls: Boss Mabel
programme.desc: When Mabel questions the way Sam runs the Shack, he challenges her to a bet: whoever can make the most money in three days wins the chance to run the Shack however they wish for the rest of the summer.

programme.title: Gravity Falls: The Stanchurian Candidate
programme.desc: When Grunkle Stan decides to run for mayor, Dipper and Mabel have their work cut out for them trying to turn their gaffe-prone uncle into the perfect candidate.

programme.title: Star Wars Resistance: From Beneath
programme.desc: Flix takes Kaz and crew to his homeworld to acquire fuel from his family's refinery, only to discover the family's drilling has awoken something monstrous.

programme.title: Big Hero 6: The Series: Lie Detector
programme.desc: Hiro, Baymax and the rest of the Big Hero 6 team continue their journey to San Fransokyo.

programme.title: Polaris: Player Select: Hey Now, You're a Brawl Star
programme.desc: A compilation of top gaming videos from YouTube stars.

programme.title: Parker Plays
programme.desc: YouTube star Parker Coppins shares his hilarious gameplay commentary.

programme.title: DuckTales: Day of the Only Child!
programme.desc: Dewey creates a holiday so that triplets can be only children for just one day. Quickly, the brothers learn that they need each other more than they realized.

programme.title: DuckTales: Happy Birthday, Doofus Drake!
programme.desc: Louie and Goldie crash Doofus' birthday party to con their way into some million dollar gift bags as Della trains Huey in her favourite online game.

programme.title: Gravity Falls: Dreamscaperers
programme.desc: Dipper, Mabel and Soos must travel through Grunkle Stan's mind to defeat a tricky dream demon summoned by Lil Gideon.

programme.title: Gravity Falls: Scary-oke
programme.desc: Kyle wants to be smart like his younger sister. When The Cortex overhears this, he decides to exploit Kyle's dream. Then, Motho Jr. doesn't want to wreak havoc like the stereotypical movie monster his dad is, he just wants to dance.

programme.title: Hotel Transylvania: The Series: Breakfast at Lydia's/ The Trouble With Wendys
programme.desc: Mavis wins employee of the month and the right to share breakfast with Aunt Lydia. Later, Dr. Gillman saves Wendy's ponytail and now she's indebted to him.

programme.title: Hotel Transylvania: The Series: Fright of Hand/ Dude Where's My Garlic?
programme.desc: Mavis goes a bit too far in wanting to show Aunt Lydia she can throw a proper party.

programme.title: Hotel Transylvania: The Series: Exit Sandman/ Roadkill Trip
programme.desc: Mavis and the group rebuild Diane's chicken coop, but their efforts are interrupting the Sandman's sleeping patterns. His solution is to cast a spell on them. When Mavis and Uncle Gene learn that the Roadkill Grill is closing, they plan a road trip.

programme.title: Hotel Transylvania: The Series: Top Wing/ Fried Mean Tomatoes
programme.desc: Mavis and Quasimodo host some cooking classes at the hotel, but things don't go quiet as planned. Wendy wants to join the aerial security team, the Night Warts, but tensions arise when Mavis makes the team instead.

programme.title: Beyblade Burst Turbo: Turbo Training! Survival on the Savanna!
programme.desc: Aiger's training journey takes him to Africa where he meets with an old friend, wild child Laban Vanot.

programme.title: Inazuma Eleven Ares: Emperor Penguin vs. Polar Bear
Pokémon: Sun & Moon - Ultra Adventures: Battle Royal 151
programme.desc: The Alola Pokémon League is off to a rousing start with a Battle Royal competition among friends and rivals both old and new.

programme.title: DuckTales: Storkules in Duckburg!
programme.desc: Louie recruits Storkules for his professional monster extermination business, while Storkules faces his greatest challenge: being Donald’s roommate.

programme.title: Amphibia: Reunion
programme.desc: During a banquet hosted by the toads, Anne is reunited with a friend from home.

programme.title: Gravity Falls: The Golf War
programme.desc: After being belittled by Pacifica one too many times, Mabel challenges her to a miniature golf-off which gets a tad out of control when some local residents offer their help.

programme.title: Hotel Transylvania: The Series: Fangceanera
programme.desc: Mavis is turning 115, so it's time for her Fangceanera. This vampire rite of passage means that she'll finally earn her Dracula cape. In order to do that, however, she must complete a dangerous mission.

programme.title: Hotel Transylvania: The Series: 116 Candles/ Stop or My Mummy Will Shout
programme.desc: Mavis accidentally turns Aunt Lydia into a teenager.

programme.title: Gravity Falls: The Time Traveler's Pig
programme.desc: When Dipper wishes he could go back in time and undo a mistake he made, he discovers there is a time machine that can help him do just that. Meanwhile, it's love at first sight for Mabel when she wins a pet pig at the fair.

programme.title: Amphibia: The Big Bugball Game/ Combat Camp
programme.desc: Anne must learn the value of teamwork to win the town’s annual Bugball game.

programme.title: DuckTales: The Shadow War Part II: The Day of the Ducks!
programme.desc: Donald Duck and his nephews are reunited with Scrooge after moving into McDuck Manor.

programme.title: Big City Greens: Harvest Dinner/ Winner Winner
programme.desc: Bill and Nancy prep a special harvest dinner, while Cricket and Gramma race Tilly to get a missing ingredient. At the community center, Tilly trains to become a winner.

programme.title: Big City Greens: Trailer Trouble/ Mansion Madness

programme.desc: Two families looking to escape bad holiday memories take a vacation to an exotic Caribbean island over Christmas. Dan and his two daughters and Dana and her two sons meet as the cruise ship docks in Puerto Rico.

programme.title: Movie: The Santa Con
programme.desc: A small-time con man is ordered to take a job as a department store Santa during the holidays. Near the end of his first shift, he promises a young boy Santa will bring his estranged parents back together.

programme.title: Movie: Merry In-Laws
programme.desc: A woman says yes to her boyfriend's marriage proposal without knowing that her soon-to-be in-laws are Mr. And Mrs. Claus.

programme.title: Movie: Love at the Christmas Table
programme.desc: Two friends who have spent every Christmas together at the children's table realize they are meant to be together.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Deadly Matrimony
programme.desc: A young woman claims to need some time away on her own. After 20 years go by, her family begins to believe they will never know what happened to her, until one day they receive a phone call that will alter everything.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Grounds for Indictment
programme.desc: When police have trouble pinning a suspect to the scene of the crime in a deadly drive-by-shooting, even after investigating cell phone calls and shell casings, they turn to the dirt in the perpetrator's tires.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Bed of Deceit
programme.desc: When a retired police officer is found shot dead in his bed, investigators suspect suicide. But the evidence, alongside surveillance tape from a nearby bank, seems to indicate it was murder.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Letter Perfect
programme.desc: A healthy young man dies mysteriously in his sleep. There are no signs of trauma or injury, but toxicology tests reveal a lethal dose of lidocaine in his blood.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Private Thoughts
programme.desc: An entire family found dead inside their burned-out home appears to be a murder-suicide.

programme.title: Forensic Files: All the World's a Stage
programme.desc: Police must investigate one of their own when a detective says his wife shot herself in the head. While he claims he called 911 as soon as he could, evidence makes police doubt the detective's story.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Death by a Salesman
programme.desc: Even though there were no witnesses, police manage to track down murderer less than 12 hours after the fact. Using fingerprints at the scene and security camera footage, officers arrested the perpetrator even though he was out of the state, on a bus.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Web of Seduction
programme.desc: When the scene of a murder proves to be completely bare of evidence, computer forensics experts manage to dig up files on the victim's computer, and those of his wife and her lover that finger a suspect.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Point of Origin
programme.desc: In 1984, California was riddled with 10 arson fires in three weeks. When some evidence points to other fires further up north, the investigation widens and continues until a fingerprint is finally found.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Seeds for Doubt
programme.desc: A well-respected nurse in a small community dies in a car accident. Investigators suspect drunk driving, until test results come back showing no alcohol was ingested.

programme.title: Something's Killing Me: Forgotten But Fatal
programme.desc: Florida college student Lindsey Meyer and Michigan E.M.T Kevin Nesbit both come down with a painful sore throat. What seems like a symptom of the common cold, soon spirals into a life or death situation.

programme.title: The Dead Wives Club: The Bookie's Wife
programme.desc: Doris Angleton, a Houston socialite, is found shot to death on her kitchen floor, while her husband Bob was coaching their twin daughters’ softball game.

programme.title: Something's Killing Me: Miracle Dog
programme.desc: Paul and Alison Frase were told their child's disorder had no treatment and no cure. Scientists tell them their one hope depends on finding a dog and the right genetic code; they set on a quest to find that one-in-a-million dog.

programme.desc: A serial killer that admires the infamous Zodiac Killer prowls New York City's streets for six years, trying to kill one person for every zodiac sign. Police use a variety of forensic tools to arrest the culprit.

programme.title: Forensic Files: True Lies

programme.title: Forensic Files: Smoke in Your Eyes
programme.desc: The bodies of two young women are found in the ashes of an apartment fire, which appears to have been set deliberately.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Flower Power
programme.desc: Two different men call police to report the same murder. Apparently, neither one knew that the other had called.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Past Lives: The Madison Rutherford Case

programme.title: Alaska: The Last Frontier Exposed: Otto's Surprise
programme.desc: With insider facts and Frontier extras: Jane and Charlotte get word of a sick calf at the Head of the Bay and trek through bear country to protect their herd.

programme.title: Alaska: The Last Frontier: Having a Blast
programme.desc: The Kilchers use dynamite to blast a section of their main road and improve access to the homestead. Jane and Charlotte brave muddy bogs for good fishing, and a risky salvage mission goes wrong.

programme.title: Building Off the Grid: Tropical Paradise
programme.desc: A couple plans to build an oceanfront oasis for their family on the slopes of Maui, Hawaii. To keep the budget low, they design a Quonset hut which can be built cheaply and quickly, but unexpected setbacks test their limits at every turn.

programme.title: Building Off the Grid: Edge of Maine
programme.desc: A creative family builds a three-story tiny house full of clever features in the easternmost property in the U.S. But with limited experience and a tight deadline, they'll need the help of a few locals to get it done. Follow their journey now.

programme.title: Alaska: The Last Frontier: Having a Blast

programme.title: Building Off the Grid: Hawaiian Hideaway
programme.desc: Innovative designer and builder Graham Hill sets out to transform a steep Maui jungle plot into a 600-square-foot, hi-tech dream home with multiple moving walls and other space-maximizing features.

programme.title: Alaska: The Last Frontier: Call of the Wild
programme.desc: Otto and Eivin use a duck hunt for some last minute father-son time before Eivin becomes a dad himself. Atz and Atz Lee's father-son bonding time is less fun - they're repairing the new bridge. Jane has her own adventure: fishing and shooting halibut.

programme.title: Alaska: The Last Frontier: Circle of Life
programme.desc: Atz Lee and Eivin take a bush plane and brave bears on a remote island to hunt deer. Charlotte scrambles to save a cow that went down during birthing. A very pregnant Eve struggles with the chores while Eivin is away. Atz cleans his chimney Kilcher style.

programme.title: Fast N' Loud: '48 Chevy Fleetmaster
programme.desc: Richard gets ripped off on a '74 Corvette. A Chevy and 'Scarface' worthy '63 Caddy are auctioned off.

programme.title: Fast N' Loud: Ramshackle Rambler
programme.desc: The crew restores a 59 Rambler to make it SoCal surf-worthy once more. Richard tries to prove that his Willys Coupe Gasser has a connection to a legendary drag racing team.

programme.title: Fast N' Loud: One of a Kind Woodill
programme.desc: The Gas Monkey crew have to handle a rare, fragile and flammable fiberglass-bodied Woodill Wildfire with kid gloves if they're going to make a six-figure sale. The boys take in a Harley and then blow off steam by entering Richard in the Demolition Derby.

programme.title: Fast N' Loud: Fast and Furious Fairmont
programme.desc: An ugly 1978 Ford Fairmont is turned into a cool, mirrored drift car. Richard flips a rare 1967 Corvette Stingray.

programme.title: Fast N' Loud: Low Riding Lincoln
programme.desc: Richard and Aaron turn a 1970 Lincoln Continental Mark III into a muscle car and picks up a 1970's style hot rod kit car with a mysterious past.

programme.title: Fast N' Loud: Frankensteined Ford
programme.desc: The guys put a '68 Ford F-100 truck together by combining parts from other cars that shouldn't go together. Rich relives his youth with a '77 Trans Am Firebird.

programme.title: Fast N' Loud: Model A Madness
programme.desc: Richard and Aaron look to make extra cash as the renovation cost for their 1931 Model A hot rod is adding up.

programme.title: Fast N' Loud: Amazing Impala
programme.desc: The crew dig out a '64 Impala that's been buried for 10 years and bring it back to life. Sparks fly between a former firefighter and a 1951 Bruco Fire Truck.

programme.title: Street Outlaws: Outcast Mentality
programme.desc: With three drivers in the top five, NOLA shows no signs of slowing down as racers head into round two in Idaho. Meanwhile, teamwork doesn't come naturally to the newly-formed Team Outcast.

programme.title: Street Outlaws: Whatever it Takes
programme.desc: The racers head to Route 66 Raceway in Illinois for the fifth event of the season. Lizzy and Team NOLA now have three straight wins under their belt so the competition is prepared to do anything to get ahead, even if it involves fighting.

programme.title: 90 Day Fiancé: I Want to Kiss You

programme.desc: Tania races to meet Syngin at the airport in time for a special arrival. Anna introduces Mursel to her family, and reveals a secret. Emily and Sasha have a tense meeting with his ex-wife, and interview allegations may prevent Juliana from coming.

programme.title: Sweet Home Sextuplets: Milestones and Meltdowns
programme.desc: It's a week of milestones and meltdowns. The family gets a big van, and their first drive is frightening. The twins graduate from kindergarten, but Bridge has a major fit. Sextuplets turn 6-months, and a group photo shoot turns into complete chaos.

programme.title: Sweet Home Sextuplets: No Finish Line With Nine
programme.desc: Courtney and Eric stress about hosting a big 5K charity event, while also making sure the six babies stay on track developmentally. Major decisions need to be made, knowing Courtney's maternity leave pay is ending and they may be losing their nanny soon.

programme.title: Extreme Cheapskates: All Wrapped Up
programme.desc: Todd Moriarty is obsessed with preserving the value of his assets. In an effort to keep his home looking like new, he wraps all of his possessions - from his car to his bathroom, in plastic wrap.

programme.title: Extreme Cheapskates: In Sickness and in Wealth
programme.desc: Extreme Cheapskates Karen and Barry cannot stand the idea of spending money. Whether it's frying breakfast on the car engine or pulling out their own tooth at home, no task is too big and no savings too small.

programme.title: Extreme Cheapskates: Vacations
programme.desc: Follow a group of penny-pinching Americans who want to hit the open road without breaking open their wallets. Meet a family of four who share one bunk bed at a Dude Ranch and a mom and daughter who wear their clothes and pack food in their carry on.

programme.title: Long Island Medium: Larry Returns
programme.desc: Theresa reads a young girl whose parents believe she may also possess the gift of communicating with those who have passed. It's an emotional family reunion when Theresa's ex-husband Larry returns to Long Island for Victoria's engagement party.

programme.title: Long Island Medium: Keeping the Faith
programme.desc: Theresa conducts a group reading for people of different faiths to show how everyone is connected by Spirit. A pastor, a rabbi, a practicing Buddhist and members of the Hindu faith receive meaningful readings.

programme.title: Lone Star Law: Armed and Dangerous
programme.desc: Texas Game Wardens see plenty of violations at night, from road hunters to felons possessing firearms. Game Wardens stop wildlife crimes with anonymous tips about anglers keeping over the limit and a specially trained k-9 unit to sniff out illegal items.

programme.title: Lone Star Law: Owl Gone Bad
programme.desc: It's the opening of deer and oyster season in Texas. On the Gulf, Game Wardens find illegal undersized oysters. In East Texas, Game Wardens patrol deer camps. An owl is rescued from a chicken coop and set free.

programme.title: Lone Star Law: Justice Served
programme.desc: Game Wardens stay busy patrolling all over the state of Texas. On Lake Sam Rayburn, a water patrol turns into a cry for help. The wardens serve a warrant to a man who illegally shot a hog. A drug arrest leads a game warden into a manhunt.

programme.title: Lone Star Law: Shrimp and Run
programme.desc: For Texas game wardens, the unexpected is all part of the routine. A shrimp boat tries to make a run for it. One warden makes some furry friends. A simple trespass warning turns into a trip to jail. A warden helps a woman spiraling out of control.

programme.title: Lone Star Law: Bigger and Better: Calm After the Storm
programme.desc: Game Warden Eddins helps a neighbour in need. Reneau responds to a call about a baby red-tailed hawk. Game Warden Richards attempts to serve an arrest warrant. Game Warden Startz patrols solo on the Guadalupe River. Wardens monitor the Rio Grande.

programme.title: Lone Star Law: Rattled
programme.desc: In Jasper County, Game Warden Boone responds to a venomous rattlesnake. Game wardens investigate the illegal killing of a goose in the Texas Panhandle. In South Texas, Game Wardens follow up on a tip about a man going over the fishing limit.

programme.title: Lone Star Law: Hunting Hunters
programme.desc: Across Texas, the wardens enforce the law during prime deer season. Bad weather conditions lead to a serious car wreck. A tipster reports an injured owl. A hunter harassment issue between neighbors is addressed. Illegal deer disposals are investigated.

programme.title: Lone Star Law: Pelicans and Poachers

programme.desc: Mother Nature's meanest creatures prove that you can’t always go it alone.

programme.desc: Buckeye prepares for the arrival of his father, Timothy Bottoms.

programme.title: The Incredible Dr. Pol: How Now Downed Cow?
programme.desc: In another emergency farm call, Dr. Pol must treat a dairy cow with a Left Displaced Abomasum, or a twisted stomach, which means that one of the cow's four stomachs has floated to the top of the abdominal cavity.

programme.title: How It's Made: Nuno Felt, Drum Crushers, Kimchi and Parquet Floors
programme.desc: Featuring nuno felt; drum crushers; kimchi; traditional parquet floors.

programme.title: How It's Made: Racing Leathers, Evaporative Cooling Towers, Rocking Chairs, Wheels
programme.desc: This episode features racing leathers, evaporative cooling towers, wooden rocking chairs and wire wheels.

programme.title: Unearthed: Wrath of Attila the Hun
programme.desc: New evidence reveals if Attila the Hun was responsible for the fall of the Roman Empire.

programme.title: Unearthed: Pompeii's Evil Twin
programme.desc: The lost city of Baiae was the Las Vegas of the ancient world, until a mysterious calamity caused it to sink into the sea. New discoveries reveal the secrets of this sin city that, like Pompeii, some experts believe was destroyed by a supervolcano.

programme.title: Unearthed: Lost Temples of the Jungle
programme.desc: New technologies reveal the startling truth behind the largest temple ever built, Angkor Wat. Accompany experts as they uncover how this colossal structure was constructed and why one of the largest cities in the world was suddenly abandoned.

programme.title: Unearthed: Vesuvius's Secret Victim
programme.desc: Scientists are using cutting edge technology to unearth a second city that, like the well-known city of Pompeii, was destroyed when Vesuvius erupted in 79 AD. This new town is revealed to be one of the most well-preserved Roman towns on earth.

programme.title: Unearthed: Lost City of Troy
programme.desc: The legendary lost city at the center of the Trojan War is Troy, but its existence has never been confirmed. Now, discoveries and cutting-edge science might prove if this place existed, and if the Greeks really conquered it with the infamous Trojan Horse.

programme.title: Unexplained and Unexplored: Curse of Superstition Mountains
programme.desc: New discoveries at the site of an alleged long-lost gold mine could lead investigators to a 200-million-dollar payday, and using cutting-edge tech, experts investigate clues in long-lost maps and relics to recover the Lost Dutchman's treasure.

programme.title: Mysteries of the Abandoned: The Devil's Prison
programme.desc: A haunted prison with a terrifying past once housed America's most notorious criminals, but today, the fortress stands in ruin, and experts reveal evidence of ghostly secrets hidden in the crumbling jailhouse walls.

programme.title: Unearthed: Lost City of Troy
programme.desc: The legendary lost city at the center of the Trojan War is Troy, but its existence has never been confirmed. Now, discoveries and cutting-edge science might prove if this place existed, and if the Greeks really conquered it with the infamous Trojan Horse.

programme.title: Unexplained and Unexplored: Curse of Superstition Mountains
programme.desc: New discoveries at the site of an alleged long-lost gold mine could lead investigators to a 200-million-dollar payday, and using cutting-edge tech, experts investigate clues in long-lost maps and relics to recover the Lost Dutchman's treasure.

programme.title: Mysteries of the Abandoned: The Devil's Prison
programme.desc: A haunted prison with a terrifying past once housed America's most notorious criminals, but today, the fortress stands in ruin, and experts reveal evidence of ghostly secrets hidden in the crumbling jailhouse walls.

programme.title: Unearthed: Vesuvius's Secret Victim
programme.desc: Scientists are using cutting edge technology to unearth a second city that, like the well-known city of Pompeii, was destroyed when Vesuvius erupted in 79 AD. This new town is revealed to be one of the most well-preserved Roman towns on earth.

programme.title: Space's Deepest Secrets: Expedition Extraterrestrial
programme.desc: Scientists on the hunt for extraterrestrial life suspect that it might be closer than we think: our very own solar system. Using the latest discoveries, experts might at last confirm that our neighbors might harbor alien life.

programme.title: Space's Deepest Secrets: Rise of the Monster Stars
programme.desc: The most extreme stars in our universe could be the key to understanding life in the cosmos. These monster stars are among the oldest in the universe, and can be hundreds of times larger than our Sun and burn over million times brighter.

programme.title: Space's Deepest Secrets: Hunt for the Missing Black Holes
programme.desc: New discoveries might finally reveal how supermassive black holes are made, and using the latest technology, experts are on the verge of understanding how these monsters grow and how they affect life on our planet.

programme.title: Space's Deepest Secrets: Dark Secrets of the Solar System
programme.desc: New evidence is rewriting the history of our solar system, and using the latest discoveries and cutting-edge tech, experts are investigating if our cosmic neighborhood once featured oversized alien Earths and a second Sun.

programme.title: Space's Deepest Secrets: Journey to Alien Earths
programme.desc: New discoveries of alien earths reveal vital clues in finding extraterrestrial life, using the latest science and technology, experts reveal the strange landscapes and oceans of these distant worlds.

programme.title: UFOs: The Lost Evidence: Deep Sea Encounters
programme.desc: For decades UFO research has been directed to the skies, but newly declassified documents, along with advances in technology are leading UFO researchers to believe that UFOs may also be inhabiting oceans.

programme.title: UFOs: The Lost Evidence: Police UFO Files
programme.desc: Using archival audio recordings, official transcripts and incident reports, UFO researchers investigate what really happened during incredible and sometimes life-threatening encounters between law enforcement and UFOs.

programme.title: UFOs: The Lost Evidence: UFOs and the Presidents: FDR to JFK
programme.desc: Investigators reveal the secret history between US Presidents and the UFO phenomenon, from FDR's knowledge about a UFO battle over Los Angeles to JFK's alleged plan to share extraterrestrial secrets with the Russians.

programme.title: UFOs: The Lost Evidence: Native Americans and Star People
programme.desc: Astonishing new evidence and modern-day UFO sightings have experts rethinking ancient otherworldly Native American myths.

programme.title: UFOs: The Lost Evidence: UFO Abduction
programme.desc: Only recently have researchers begun to understand and investigate the phenomenon of alien abduction. While today such claims are dismissed as hoax or delusion, there are time-tested, landmark cases that mainstream scholars struggle to refute.

programme.title: UFOs: The Lost Evidence: Extraterrestrials and Sacred Sites
programme.desc: Startling evidence suggests contact with interstellar travelers in the distant past may have influenced mankind and many of our sacred sites.

programme.title: UFOs: The Lost Evidence: Area 52
programme.desc: Few have ever heard about the ultra top-secret military base in the remote deserts of Utah known as Area 52.

programme.title: Jacked: Auto Theft Task Force: Saturday Night
programme.desc: A deliveryman has his car stolen at gunpoint, and the unit uses a decoy vehicle to try to catch the suspects. The Unit changes their schedule to catch the thieves off guard.

programme.title: Nightwatch: Those We Rely On
programme.desc: It's an emotional night on the Nightwatch in New Orleans as one EMS officer tells his partner that this is their last night on the job.

programme.title: Kansas City SWAT
programme.desc: Charles 'Chip' Huth and Kansas City SWAT head out on a high-stakes drug-warrant. The team will make simultaneous hits on two locations in the same apartment complex.

programme.title: Kansas City SWAT
programme.desc: It's a tense situation as Sgt. Paul Hamilton and his squad get caught up in a high-speed car chase to bring down a suspected auto theft ring. Later, Paul's squad joins Huth's to double their efforts and hit two houses at once.

programme.title: Kansas City SWAT
programme.desc: Sergeant Joe McHale and his tactical team are called in to coax an unstable man out of his hotel room after he stabs a hotel employee. But when the man turns the knife on himself, McHale and his squad must act quickly to save a life.

programme.title: Dallas SWAT
programme.desc: The SWAT team responds to a dangerous call out: a man has barricaded himself in his apartment and is shooting multiple rounds aimlessly out the window. Trapped on the scene are a number of patrol officers who Rich Emberlin and his squad must rescue.

programme.title: Shattered: The Wood
programme.desc: 1990's. Portland, OR. A young woman survives a vicious attack... a mother sees her worst nightmare come true... and a detective investigating a series of murders finds the killer is someone he's met before.

programme.title: Shattered: River of Sorrow
programme.desc: 1981. A teenager forms a search party to find his missing 5-year-old sister. 1995. A mother frantically searches for her young son who disappears while playing near the river, and an officer prays when she recognizes the prime suspect in both cases.

programme.title: Shattered: Angel of Death
programme.desc: In 1996, Larry Schlegel visits his elderly mother at the hospital one last time before she succumbs to pneumonia. Then, years later, police give him the shock of his life, when they inform him that her death was not at all what it seemed.

programme.title: Shattered: Welcome to Santa Claus
programme.desc: December 1997. Santa Claus, Georgia. A ten-year-old girl is kidnapped from her bed in the middle of the night. A woman fears something terrible has happened at her friend's home. A deputy on a routine welfare check discovers a house of horrors.

programme.title: 20/20 on ID: Gone in the Night
programme.desc: A couple wakes up to find their baby's crib empty. They are certain she has been kidnapped. But many believe the parents are the culprits.

programme.title: American Monster: Too Good to be True
programme.desc: When attractive teacher Amanda Schmitt marries respected John Grazioli, home video captures their beautiful wedding. But just 6 months later, police respond to a 911 call and make a shocking discovery that unmasks the double life of a cold-hearted killer.

programme.title: On the Case With Paula Zahn: The Disappearance of Sarah Stern
programme.desc: When a young woman's car is found abandoned on a bridge, police must consider three possibilities, she's run away, committed suicide, or is the victim of murder.

programme.title: American Monster: Life of the Party
programme.desc: Doug and Rose quickly strike up a romance and later marry. But behind the perfect façade seen in these exclusive home videos, lies and deceit begin to surface. A no show at Thanksgiving and a box on the roadside lead to a shocking discovery.

programme.desc: Kelly Quinn arrived home one night and found herself at the mercy of two rapists, but she helped the FBI track them down and ended their reign of terror.

programme.title: FBI Case Files: The Woman With the Neck Tattoo
programme.desc: A young mother was fooled into handing her baby to a stranger, and watched in horror as they disappeared.

programme.title: Obsession: Dark Desires: Serenade of a Stalker
programme.desc: 33 year old Nikki is building a karaoke business with her husband, Ben. But one night, a customer with an obsession for Nikki ends not only the dream but shatters her entire life with an act of extreme and unprovoked violence.

programme.title: Obsession: Dark Desires: Campaign Trail of Fears
programme.desc: A Texas politician and his wife are stalked by their private pilot, who will stop at nothing to destroy them.

programme.title: Obsession: Dark Desires: Cross Your Heart and Hope to Die
programme.desc: Sarah is dating a young, handsome pastor but soon discovers her preacher man is hiding unholy secrets on a biblical scale. He is prepared to silence Sarah and her whole family to stop her leaving him.

programme.title: Dateline: The Wire
programme.desc: A young nurse was murdered in her small studio apartment with only a broken necklace and an unusual weapon found as evidence. Twenty years after the case went cold, a determined detective attempts to crack it.

programme.title: Dateline: The Wire
programme.desc: A young nurse was murdered in her small studio apartment with only a broken necklace and an unusual weapon found as evidence. Twenty years after the case went cold, a determined detective attempts to crack it.

programme.title: Dateline: The Usual Suspect
programme.desc: Two mothers and their teenage daughters are murdered in a suburb of Maryland, investigators must determine if this is the work of a serial killer. As new clues are found, they learn a master thief may hold the key.

programme.title: Dead Silent: Welcome to the Devil House
programme.desc: A mansion deep in the Georgia woods is said to house terrible secrets. Everyone in this rural county has heard the rumors, but no one knows the truth ... until a 1982 visit to Corpsewood Manor by a group of young locals turns deadly.

programme.title: Dead Silent: The Stranger on the Hill
programme.desc: For college sweethearts Ashley Freeman and Mike Grinnan, a late-night drive to a secluded Texas hill leads to a night of terror and a desperate fight for survival.

programme.title: Dead Silent: Madness on the Lake
programme.desc: The remote lakeside town of Bayview, Idaho is a little too quiet for local resident Larry Cragun, and soon the isolation gets to him.

programme.title: Dead Silent: A Killer in the Swamp
programme.desc: A young woman relocates to the marshes of the Ocala National Forest in Florida in search of some peace and a fresh start, but what once appeared to be a remote paradise, soon shows its true colors.

programme.title: What History Forgot: To the Ends of the World
programme.desc: Delve into the unknown stories behind some of the biggest disasters, threats and conquests in America's skies. From the attack on Pearl Harbor, the Hindenburg disaster, Apollo 13 and the race to the Moon.

programme.title: Nazi Fugitives: Adolf Eichmann
programme.desc: This is the hunt for Adolf Eichmann, considered by many to be one of the main architects of the Holocaust.

programme.title: Nazi Fugitives: Joseph Mengele
programme.desc: Examine how Mossad agents from Israel spent nearly thirty years tracking the notorious Nazi physician Josef Mengele.

programme.title: Nazi Fugitives: Kurt Lishka
programme.desc: The story of German housewife Beate Klarsfeld and her husband Serge, who helped track down former Paris Gestapo chief Kurt Lishka. Lishka ordered the arrest and murder of over 33,000 Jews yet lived as a free man in Germany for years.

programme.title: World War II: Witness to War: Bombing the Reich
programme.desc: Devastation touches the civilians of Germany. With the U.S. as a newly engaged Ally, western forces bring the war to the Axis front, but at extreme costs.

programme.title: World War II in Color: Red Sun Rampant
programme.desc: On December 7th 1941, WWII changed dramatically as Japanese planes swooped in for a surprise attack on the U.S. Pacific Fleet in Pearl Harbour. A conflict that had been fought almost entirely in Europe was now to be fought worldwide.

programme.title: World War II in Color: Hitler Strikes East
programme.desc: By the autumn of 1940, Hitler's forces were supreme in Western Europe. Britain remained undefeated but the country was isolated and Hitler no longer considered it a threat. The Fuhrer was ready for his greatest gamble - Operation Barbarossa.

programme.title: WWII: Masters of War: Joseph Stalin
programme.desc: It's clear Nazi Germany lost the war, but the real winner remains uncertain. At the Yalta Conference, the United States, Britain and the Soviet Union compete for domination of Europe.

programme.desc: The story of German housewife Beate Klarsfeld and her husband Serge, who helped track down former Paris Gestapo chief Kurt Lishka. Lishka ordered the arrest and murder of over 33,000 Jews yet lived as a free man in Germany for years.

programme.title: Nazi Fugitives: Joseph Mengele
programme.desc: Examine how Mossad agents from Israel spent nearly thirty years tracking the notorious Nazi physician Josef Mengele.

programme.title: Blood Feuds: Hatfields and McCoys
programme.desc: The Hatfields (Devil Anse) versus the McCoys (Randall) is one of the most notorious feuds in American history. What starts as Civil War hostility rapidly escalates to kidnapping, illicit love affairs, murder, and a nation-wide turf war.

programme.title: Blood Feuds: Yukon Gold Rush War
programme.desc: This epic Gold Rush showdown pits legendary conman Jefferson 'Soapy' Smith and his loyal 'Soap Gang' against town organizer-turned vigilante Frank Reid and the Committee of 101, in a battle to bring justice to the lawless Alaskan Frontier.

programme.title: Blood Feuds: The Pleasant Valley War
programme.desc: In the dangerous frontier of Arizona, two ranching families begin as friends, but become locked in an epic battle known as the Pleasant Valley War. It's the deadliest 'family' feud in U.S. history.

programme.title: Blood Feuds: Gangs of New York
programme.desc: This notorious feud is one of the largest street wars in history. William Poole ('Bill the Butcher') rules New York's viciously anti-immigrant nativist gang, but the Bowery Boys challenge their hold.

programme.title: WWII in the Pacific: Island Warfare
programme.desc: By the summer of 1942, the US has the upper hand in the war with Japan. It has achieved naval superiority. In the spring of 1945 the loss of life is great for both sides but Japan refuses to surrender. US Chiefs desperately look for a way to end the way.

programme.title: WWII in the Pacific: No Surrender
programme.desc: The war is turning America's way. Yet Japan is determined to kill as many Americans as possible and fight to the death. The US must determine if it has the stomach for the fight, or if there is a secret weapon that offers a quick way out.

programme.title: World War II: Witness to War: Fall of Berlin
programme.desc: Survivors recount the horrors and strength behind surviving such a merciless place and the shock of Allied soldiers as they discover the evil secret of Germany's concentration camps.

programme.title: World War II: Witness to War: Hell in the Pacific
programme.desc: The brave men and woman who fought along the tides of the Pacific share their stories. Both Japanese and U.S. forces face off with an intense determination and will to survive.

programme.title: World War II: Witness to War: Eastern Front
programme.desc: The war reaches a critical turning point as Hitler expands the war to a second front. German soldiers endure the unrelenting climate of the Eastern Front, and face the full-force of angry Red Army fighters.

programme.title: World War II: Witness to War: D-Day and Liberation
programme.desc: Listen to the astonishing stories behind the liberation of France and hear the price many soldiers had to pay in order for the Allies to take France back from the Germans.

programme.title: Texas Flip and Move: Quaint Cottage vs. a Tiny House
programme.desc: The Snow sisters score a little cottage that needs a LOT of TLC. Randy starts out at an advantage with money in his pocket when he grabs a little box house addition that someone offered him $500 to haul away.

programme.title: Texas Flip and Move: The Snows Make Over a Duplex With a Bird Theme
programme.desc: Donna and Tony buy a duplex and decide to turn it into a single-family home. Their design inspiration is a whimsical bird theme, but the renovation hits a snag when they discover extensive termite damage during the demolition.

programme.title: Texas Flip and Move: The Snow Sisters Each Design One Half of a House
programme.desc: The Snows take on a large house that must be cut in half before it can be moved, but only one half shows up at the new site.

programme.title: Texas Flip and Move: Snow Sisters' Sophisticated Ranch
programme.desc: Donna and Toni get lucky with a small cottage win in an auction, which they hope to turn into a classy ranch home. Their plans for the space include a sophisticated country style and want a landscape design that syncs with the home's interior.

programme.title: Building Alaska: Have Saw, Will Cut
programme.desc: Jackie's team delivers French Doors only to find the frame fits incorrectly during installation. A snow machine delivery runs into problems on the melted trail at the Hill's build site.

programme.title: Building Alaska: Gotta Be Efficient
programme.desc: Jackie's team hears propane leaking somewhere in their cabin as they install the cabinets and stove. Melting trails makes the delivery of cabinets and appliances dangerous at the Owens' build site.

programme.title: Building Alaska: Noah's Barge
programme.desc: Jere, Ben and Tim put the finishing touches on the biggest project they've undertaken: building a 112-foot floating barge. They struggle with transporting it to the water, and hurricane-force winds change their plans.

programme.title: Building Alaska: Stuck in Shelikof
programme.desc: Nick experiences firsthand just how dangerous living in Alaska can be while hunting for driftwood to build his fishing lodge and warehouse. Jere and Ben's 112-foot barge starts its half-mile journey to the water.

programme.title: Building Alaska: Gotta Be Efficient
programme.desc: Jackie's team hears propane leaking somewhere in their cabin as they install the cabinets and stove. Melting trails makes the delivery of cabinets and appliances dangerous at the Owens' build site.

programme.title: Texas Flip and Move: Casey and Catrina's Bunkhouse vs. Gary's Girls' Flunk House
programme.desc: Casey and Catrina's plan to create a bunkhouse from a bare building will take more time and money than they had originally anticipated. Meanwhile, Gary's daughters struggle to find a mover.

programme.title: Texas Flip and Move: Casey and Catrina's Woodsy Guest House
programme.desc: Casey and Catrina score big on a house that is practically new. The problem is, someone previously bought it, tried to finish out the interior and failed. Now they're faced with the task of correcting the botched job.

programme.title: Texas Flip and Move: Cute House With Inner Catastrophe
programme.desc: Casey and Catrina win a home with lots of charm and curb appeal, but once they look inside, they find it has been completely gutted. They must design a floor plan that will bring the interior appeal up to that of the cute exterior.

programme.title: Texas Flip and Move: Eco-Friendly House vs. Hot Mess
programme.desc: Randy wins an old mobile home at auction and strikes up a deal with Casey so they can both make a profit. Meanwhile, the Snow sisters come up with an eco-friendly design for their house.

programme.title: Texas Flip and Move: The Snow Sisters Tiny Shack Shake-Up vs. Cousin Casey's Old Church Conversion
programme.desc: The Young Guns score a house that used to be a church but when they're called out of town, cousin Casey takes over the flip. Donna and Toni win a tiny one-room service building that they completely transform into a cottage retreat.

programme.title: Maine Cabin Masters: Off-The-Grid Renovation
programme.desc: Chase Morrill and his team renovate an off-the-grid hunting cabin deep in the woods of Oxford, ME. They have a budget of $20,000 and a time frame of six weeks. They face many challenges associated with building off-the-grid.

programme.title: Maine Cabin Masters: Rebuilding The Old Schoolhouse
programme.desc: Chase Morrill and his team of Cabin Masters hike through the woods of Dedham, ME, to restore a dilapidated family camp that was once the old schoolhouse. A serious case of rot threatens to close down the entire project.

programme.title: Maine Cabin Masters: Not-So-Pleasant Camp On Pleasant Pond
programme.desc: Chase and his team are called in to renovate a neglected camp for a growing family. Right away, the unusual footprint proves troublesome when trying to create a second bedroom inside.

programme.title: Maine Cabin Masters: Desert Pond Hideaway
programme.desc: Chase and the team travel to a secluded piece of land close to Desert Pond to help a couple turn their forgotten shack into a relaxing retreat. The couple have big ambitions leaving the crew stretching a $30,000 budget in only four weeks.

programme.title: Cupcake Wars: Tree People
programme.desc: Four cupcake bakers compete to have their creations featured at the Tree Peoples' Harvest Moon Gala for environmental conservation.

programme.title: Carnival Eats: Planet Of The Dates
programme.desc: Noah Cappe is ready for 1,001 nights of fun at the Arabian Nights-themed Riverside County Fair and National Date Festival in Indio, Calif. He makes a date with a dangerous burger and enjoys a sweet mashup with the churro dog.

programme.title: Carnival Eats: There Will Be Bacon
programme.desc: Noah Cappe pigs out at the Bacon and Bourbon Fest in Wellington, Fla., where all-American classics make an appearance in the stuffed crust bacon-za, but it's the peanut butter pork donuts that hit the sweet and salty spot.

programme.title: Carnival Eats: Mocktail
programme.desc: Noah Cappe goes loco for Sunshine State snacks at the Manatee County Fair in Palmetto, Fla. There's lots of ooey-gooey goodness in the pizza supremo burger and the ulti-melt burger, but it's the sandia loca that has Noah flipping out.

programme.title: Carnival Eats: Beauty and the Beef
programme.desc: It's love at first bite as Noah Cappe munches on some Texas-sized treats at Rodeo Austin. With a tagline of "where Western meets weird," the Rodeo is the place to find one-of-a-kind carnival eats like the Kobe beef Rodeo Austin burger.

programme.title: Carnival Eats: Fight Club Sandwich
programme.desc: Noah Cappe meets his match with some knock-out fruity feasts at the Florida Strawberry Festival in Plant City. He starts the day with the strawberry French toast burger and slurps the way better strawberry shake.

programme.title: Carnival Eats: Hot Dog Time Machine
programme.desc: Noah Cappe takes a trip to the Coastal Carolina Fair near Charleston, S.C., where he samples a local legend, Jack's Cosmic Dog. Trolling the fairgrounds, Noah catches the catfish sundae and takes a bite of fall flavors with the pumpkin cheesecake pop.

programme.title: Thanksgiving Grubdown
programme.desc: Carla Hall discovers some Thanksgiving traditions with a twist and a cornucopia of outrageous Turkey Day treats. Gobble until you wobble on pumpkin pancakes piled high with a slice of cheesecake.

programme.title: Bizarre Foods: Delicious Destinations: Sicily
programme.desc: Andrew Zimmern samples Sicily's fried street eats, classic cannoli and unique pizza.

programme.title: Bizarre Foods: Delicious Destinations: Jamaica
programme.desc: In a country celebrated for its colorful culture, Jamaica's heritage-rich food lives up to the hype. Andrew Zimmern explores island icons from jerk chicken and mannish water soup, to curry goat, blue mountain coffee, and gizzadas.

programme.title: Food Paradise: Local Lowdown
programme.desc: From a hidden pizza haven in San Diego to a Jewish deli in Miami and a legendary pub in Baltimore, we're getting the lowdown on the best local grub across the country by asking locals where they go to satisfy their cravings.

programme.title: Food Paradise: Viva Las Vegas
programme.desc: Sin City's most over-the-top eats are explored. Sushi-stacked burger on fried rice buns and spiked milkshake topped with a campfire's worth of s'mores.

programme.title: Rev Run's Sunday Suppers: Rev's Pulled Pork Perfection

programme.desc: Justine's sister and niece are the guests this week and Justine is excited. Her sister, Michelle, is a chef by trade and the Simmons family knows what's in store for dinner.

programme.desc: The Simmons family vegetarian, Angela, is in the house this week. She plans to make her favorite meal, veggie tacos, while rev thinks of ways to supplement to meal with a juicy steak.

programme.title: Rev Run's Sunday Suppers: Jive Turkey

programme.title: Brunch @ Bobby's: Brunch in Bloom
programme.desc: Chef Bobby Flay prepares a garden fresh menu using his favorite fruits, vegetables and herbs like strawberry waffles with lemon curd cream, an open faced omelet with herb cream cheese topped with smoked salmon and grilled asparagus.

programme.desc: A weekend staycation brunch at Chef Bobby Flay's home! Bobby's kitchen is the destination for a cozy menu of crunchy maple topped oatmeal, avocado salmon benedict, cinnamon sugar mini pancake muffins.

programme.title: TrueSouth: Birmingham
programme.desc: Get to know the good people of the south through experiencing southern food and culture.

programme.title: TrueSouth: New Orleans
programme.desc: From Liuzza's and Mandina's – two Sicilian corner stores that have become neighborhood Creole Italian restaurants – look at how and why some stories get erased while others become defining narratives.

programme.title: TrueSouth: Beaumont
programme.desc: Once a Southern institution, barbecue has become an American obsession and Texas brisket has been mainstreamed. This is a story about a scrappy onetime oil boomtown, where cooks make the most of scraps, and about two Gulf Coast dishes that have hung on.

programme.title: TrueSouth: Hodgenville
programme.desc: In the southern towns of Hodgenville and Bardstown, Kentucky, the land where Lincoln was born, conflicting ideas about identity and purpose come into focus. Onion burgers and country sausage prove constants in a time of great change.

programme.title: Saturdays in the South: A History of SEC Football: Part Three: 1960-1970
programme.desc: In the 1960s, Georgia Tech leaves the conference and the civil rights movement becomes embedded in the history and image of the region. Bear Bryant, hired in 1958, becomes the face of Alabama, and of SEC football.

programme.title: Saturdays in the South: A History of SEC Football: Part Four: 1969-1979
programme.desc: As a new decade dawns, quarterbacks Archie Manning, Bert Jones and Condredge Holloway build memorable legacies. Bear Bryant begins a new run of dominance at Alabama, and the rise of television sports transforms the SEC.

programme.title: Football
programme.desc: Football.

programme.title: Saturdays in the South: A History of SEC Football: Part Five: 1980-1989
programme.desc: The 1980s begin with Herschel Walker leading Georgia to a national title as a freshman. After Bear Bryant retires in 1982 and passes away four weeks later, control of the SEC is eventually transferred to Pat Dye and Bo Jackson at Auburn.

programme.title: Saturdays in the South: A History of SEC Football: Part Six: 1990-1999
programme.desc: The 1990s bring change with expansion and the sport's first-ever conference championship game. Florida's Steve Spurrier fashions an era of high-octane offense, and his Gators form a rivalry with Tennessee and quarterback Peyton Manning.

programme.title: SEC This Morning
programme.desc: Analysts discuss the latest news and upcoming events in the SEC.

programme.title: The Goldbergs: The Age of Darkness

programme.title: JFK's Women: The Scandals Revealed
programme.desc: Discover the dangerous sexual liaisons of U.S. President John F. Kennedy. This explosive bio reveals the President was prepared to risk his political career and his country's security in return for sex.

programme.title: 9/11: Escape From the Towers
programme.desc: Each World Trade Center tower consisted of 110 floors. Each floor has a story. In this two-hour special, survivors from two of those floors, many speaking publicly for the first time, tell their stories.

programme.title: Hunting Hitler: Ratlines

programme.title: Nostradamus Effect: Hitler's Blood Oath

programme.title: The Fall of France

programme.title: Vietnam in HD: An Endless War (1968-1969)
programme.desc: Nixon wins the presidency in 1968 and troop strength in Vietnam peaks and the draft accelerates.

programme.title: Decoding the Past: Nazi Prophecies
programme.desc: From biblical times prophecies have painted a chilling portrait of Hitler's rise and fall.

programme.title: In Search of Atlantis
programme.desc: With Plato's ancient writing as his guide, an epic 2-part journey begins to find the lost civilization of Atlantis, and proof that it was a real empire. The search includes the Palace of Knossos in Crete, and the fabled island of Sardinia.

programme.title: Wayne Allyn Root: Raw & Unfiltered
programme.desc: Wayne Allyn Root is a fierce, enthusiastic champion of Reagan conservatism.

programme.title: Brad Meltzer's Lost History: D-Day Footage
